Abandoned Waterfront
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-18
•
48-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Estates
Burrwitch Village
Festering Lair
Quests:
None
Abandoned Waterfront
is a world area in
Act 1
. It  connects to
Burrwitch Estates
,
Burrwitch Village
and the
Festering Lair
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Act 1
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Act_1
======================================================================

The first act of
Grim Dawn
is set in the swamps and backwaters of Burrwitch. The main town is
Devil's Crossing
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Act 2
CATEGORIES: Locations, Riftgate Locations

Grim Dawn's Act 2 is set in the ancient ruins of Old Arkovia and involves dealing with the threat to Devil's Crossing posed by
Cronley's Gang
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Act 3
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Act_3
======================================================================

Act 3 involves reaching Homestead and dealing with both the food shortage and the threats posed by the Aetherials and Chthonians.

======================================================================
PAGE: Act 4
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Act_4
======================================================================

Act 4 takes place in the mountainous region of Asterkarn and sees the final showdown between the Black Legion and the Chthonic forces.
Act 4 Quests

======================================================================
PAGE: Act 7
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Act_7
======================================================================

Act 7 is available with the
Forgotten Gods
Expansion and takes place in the distant land of the Korvan Basin. Although it can be accessed after killing the
Warden
at the end of
Act 1
, there are story and lore elements which place it after the other six acts.
The story chapter begins by talking to the
Emissary
, who can be found outside
Devil's Crossing
,
Homestead
,
Fort Ikon
,
Coven's Refuge
or
Sewer Hideout
. He will open a permanent portal to the Act 7 town hub, the
Conclave of the Three
.
Act 7 Quests

Altar of Rattosh
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
68-82
•
82-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Desolate Wastes
Quests:
Into the Jaws of Madness
The
Altar of Rattosh
is a tiny world area in
Act 5
located in the
Ugdenbog
north of
Barrowholm
. A Chthonic Rift to the
Desolate Wastes
is unlocked during the main quest
Into the Jaws of Madness
.
Interests
The Altar of Rattosh
Creatures
Wraith, Spiteful Wraith, Ancient Wraith
Wendigo, Wendigo Marroweater, Wendigo Flayer, Wendigo Ancient
Gallery
Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Anarchy (Location)
CATEGORIES: Act 4 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Anarchy_(Location)
======================================================================

Anarchy
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Discord
Entropy
Quests:
N/A
Anarchy
is a world area in
Act 4
and the third level of the
Bastion of Chaos
.
The center of the area features a "Death Room", a chamber which seals behind the player until cleared. It is occupied by the Hero creature
Lagoth'Ak, Harbinger of Blood
, who guards 2 Obsidian Troves.
Creatures in Anarchy are offset 4-5 levels above the player.
Interests
Obsidian Trove
Breakable wall - South side of SE island
NPCs
Karros Adal - Wares of the Damned
(unless it is in
Entropy
)
Creatures
Chthonian Hungerer

======================================================================
PAGE: Ancient Grove
CATEGORIES: Act 5 Locations

======================================================================

Ancient Grove
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
50-75
•
70-85
•
95-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Feral Thicket
Quests:
n/a
The
Ancient Grove
is a world area in
Act 5
with the entrance located in the southeast corner of
Ugdenbog
. The area has three sections, with the last two comprising one of Grim Dawn's sealed
Challenge Dungeons
. A
Skeleton Key
is required to enter the
Feral Thicket
and
Tainted Wood
, and the player cannot use a riftgate to exit; the only way out is via death or completing both levels.
The area has a +2/3/3 monster level offset.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
Creatures
Ugdenbog creatures
Boss:
Ragarroth the Tormented
, a Chthonic Manticore
Gallery
Masteries

PAGE: Anguish

Anguish
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
26-50
•
45-78
•
70-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Suffering
Quests:
None
This area is floor 5 of
The Steps of Torment
dungeon in
Act 2
.
The Unique Boss
Alkamos, Lord Executioner
resides in
Uroboruuk's Torment
, the central section of the level. Defeating him unlocks a treasure room which contains 2 Glorious Chests and a Transcendant Chest, as well as a Pillar which teleports the player to the surface near the Steps of Torment entrance.
Interests
Secret area - behind 2 breakable walls.
Ornate Strongbox
Bone Coffer
Glorious Chest
Transcendant Chest
Escape to the Surface
NPCs
Marris Kas - Wares of the Lost
- can spawn in 3 different locations.

Boss:
Alkamos, Lord Executioner

======================================================================
PAGE: Arkovian Coliseum
CATEGORIES: Act 2 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Arkovian_Coliseum
======================================================================

Arkovian Coliseum
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
22-45
•
54-70
•
73-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Twin Falls
Quests:
N/A
The
Arkovian Coliseum
is a side area in
Act 2
, and connects to
Twin Falls
. The area can be uncovered by destroying some Wasp Nests found behind a ruined tower west of the Twin Falls Rift.
The area is a Dangerous Domain and will have one random Mutator active.
Interests
Possible location for a
One-shot chest
Celestial Totem
Ornate Strongbox
Note:
Coliseum Horrors
Creatures
Arkovian Undead
:
Skeletal Warrior
Skeletal Archer
Skeletal Deathbolt Archer
Skeletal Knight
Skeletal Priest
Skeletal Warlock
Flame Revenant
Frost Revenant
Storm Revenant
Boss:
Karnath Chillblood, Coliseum Amalgam
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Arkovian Docks
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations

======================================================================

Arkovian Docks
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
30-50
•
48-76
•
70-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Twin Falls
Tyrant's Hold
Quests:
N/A
Arkovian Docks is a world area in
Act 2
. It connects to
Twin Falls
and
Tyrant's Hold
, and is populated by
Arkovian Undead
and deserters from
Cronley's Gang
.
The area can initially be accessed only from Tyrant's Hold on
Act 3
. A bridge leading to Twin Falls can be repaired on the Docks side, and the Twin Falls Riftgate used thereafter to reach the area. Both expansions/DLCs must be owned to access this area.
The area is a Dangerous Domain and will have one random Mutator active.
Interests
Possible location for a
One-shot chest
Celestial Totem
Bridge Repair Site
Hidden Spoils - behind a Crumbling Wall on the waterfront.
Notes:
We're On Our Own
(drops from
Rutnick the Cruel
)
The Scales Strike Balance

Boss:
Rutnick the Cruel

Arkovian Foothills
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
18-23
•
52-65
•
73-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Crumbling Watch
Devil's Crossing
Kymon's Retreat
Rocky Coast
Spined Cove
Staunton Mine
Quests:
Clearing the Way
The Lost Elder
Vengeance
The
Arkovian Foothills
is an area in
Act 2
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Devil's Crossing
and the
Rocky Coast
. The Foothills also contain the sub-areas
Kymon's Retreat
and the
Crumbling Watch
, as well as entrances to the underground areas
Spined Cove
and
Staunton Mine
.

Arkovian Undercity
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
22-45
•
54-70
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Old Arkovia
Quests:
The Depths of Old Arkovia
The
Arkovian Undercity
is a large underground area in
Act 2
. It has three levels. There are 2 entrances located in
Old Arkovia
, one south of the Twin Falls Riftgate, the other on the edge of the
Broken Hills
, north-east from the Broken Hills Riftgate.

======================================================================
PAGE: Ashen Waste
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Ashen_Waste
======================================================================

Ashen Waste
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
33-60
•
60-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Blood Grove
Quests:
None
The
Ashen Waste
is an area in
Act 3
and connects to
The Blood Grove
.
The area forms part of the Ch'thonic Void and can be accessed by a Chthonic Rift which spawns unmarked in several different locations around
The Blood Grove
. The player cannot cast a personal rift while in the Ashen Waste and must find another Chthonic Rift (also randomised) to exit.
Creatures in Ashen Waste are offset 2-4 levels above the player.
Related video
(Youtube)
Interests
Treasure Trove
Rag'Nadar, the Great Maw
(Boss)
Runed Stone of Mogdrogen
(if
Rhowari Legacy
is active)

Chthonic
:
Chthonian Hungerer
Chthonian Gorger

Chthonian Harbinger
Chtonian Bloodletter
Voidfiend

Obsidian Shaleborn
Obsidian Defiler
Obsidian Ravager

Asterkarn Road
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
33-48
•
63-70
•
77-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Darkvale Gate
Asterkarn Valley
Quests:
None
Asterkarn Road
is a world area in
Act 4
and connects to
Darkvale Gate
and
Asterkarn Valley
. The area has two Riftgates.
Interests
Trip South - Part 1
Trip South - Part 2
Trip South - Part 3
Untouched Meal (x2)
Creatures
Groble:
Sky Clan Scavenger
Sky Clan Tracker
Sky Clan Warrior

Chilltusk

Chillmane Brute

Chillmane Alpha

Asterkarn Valley
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
33-48
•
63-70
•
77-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Asterkarn Road
Tomb of Korvaak
Fort Ikon
Quests:
None
Asterkarn Valley
is a world area in
Act 4
. It has a Riftgate and connects to
Asterkarn Road
,
Fort Ikon
and the
Tomb of Korvaak
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal only) - requires 1
Cracked Lodestone
.
Ruined Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
(Mogdrogen's Shrine) - requires the
Rhowari Legacy
quest.
Creatures
Groble:
Sky Clan Scavenger
Sky Clan Tracker
Sky Clan Warrior
Sky Clan Champion
Sky Clan Witchdoctor
Sky Clan Stormcaller
Boar:
Chilltusk
Gargantuan Chilltusk
Frosthide Chilltusk
Yeti:
Chillmane Brute
Chillmane Rager
Chillmane Icesplitter
Chillmane Alpha
Boss:
Ragrathar Rageblood

Astral Fields
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
24-75
•
35-90
•
45-120
Riftgate:
N/A
Adjacent:
The Eldritch Gate
Throne of the Three
Quests:
N/A
The Astral Fields is a world area in
Act 7
. It serves as a transition area between the two boss rooms in
The Eldritch Gate
and the
Throne of the Three
.
Interests
Loot Chests
Hidden Remains
Korvan Secrets
Notes

Barren Highlands
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
24-40
•
56-68
•
74-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Broken Hills
Smuggler's Pass
Quests:
None
Barrens Highlands is a world area in
Act 2
. It connects to the
Broken Hills
and
Smuggler's Pass
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal Only)
Untouched Meal

Elsa

PAGE: Barrowholm (Location)

Barrowholm
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
70-82
•
84-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Quests:
many
Barrowholm
is a world area in
Act 5
It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Ugdenbog
and the
Forlorn Cellar
.
The Village is headquarters for the
Barrowholm
faction.
Interests

Notes
Aurin's Recipe
What does the future hold?

======================================================================
PAGE: Barrowholm Mine

Barrowholm Mine
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
70-82
•
85-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Quests:
-
Barrowholm Mine is a relatively large underground area in
Act 5
. It has one entrance/exit located in
Ugdenbog
.
Interests
Dynamite
Treasure Trove
Hidden Trove - northwest part of mine area
Hidden Corpse - small alcove in cave area
Ornate Strongbox
Untouched Meal
Hidden corpse Location
Creatures
Ugdenbog Crab, Ugdenbog Spikeshell, Ugdenbog Stoneshell
Basilisk, Venomgaze Basilisk, Stonegaze Basilisk
Ugdenbog Golem
Haunted Crab, Haunted Spikeshell
Boss:
Naxen Shade
- Haunted Ugdenbog Crab boss

======================================================================
PAGE: Bastion of Chaos
CATEGORIES: Act 4 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Bastion_of_Chaos
======================================================================

Bastion of Chaos
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
33-60
•
60-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Necropolis Interior
Discord
Quests:
N/A
The
Bastion of Chaos
is a world area in
Act 4
and forms part of the Chthonic Void. The area is accessed via a Chthonic Rift, located in the northernmost part of the
Necropolis Interior
, beyond the Necropolis Bridge Repair Site.
Levels 2 to 4 make up one of Grim Dawn's sealed
Challenge Dungeons
. A crafted
Skeleton Key
is required to continue beyond the first level and the player cannot use a riftgate to exit; the only way out is via death or completing all levels.
This page concerns level one only. The other levels are:
Discord
Anarchy
Entropy
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
One-Shot Chest
- Exalted Stash
Treasure Trove
Bastion Gates
Creatures
Balok'Anatu, Bloodfiend
(boss)
Gallery
Masteries
Items
Creatures
Factions
Locations
Constellations

Bastion of the Order
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Sorrow's Bastion
Quests:
Many
The
Bastion of the Order
is an area in
Act 3
and the headquarters of the
Order of Death's Vigil
. It connects to
Sorrow's Bastion
.
Interests
Laruka's Journal
Order of Death's Vigil Bounty Table

======================================================================
PAGE: Bloodbriar's Lair
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Bloodbriar's_Lair
======================================================================

Bloodbriar's Lair
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Shaded Basin
Forgotten Depths
Quests:
None
Bloodbriar's Lair
is a small underground area in
Act 3
. The cave entrance can spawn in multiple locations around the
Shaded Basin
and is unmarked. The area also has a one-way exit into the
Forgotten Depths
.
Bloodbriar's Lair is the location for completing the
Ol' Bloodbriar
side-quest.
Interests
Journeyman's Pack
Ornate Strongbox (x2)
Creatures
Riftspawn
:
Briarthorn Horror
Briarthorn Terror
Briarthorn Monstrosity
Boss:
Ol' Bloodbriar
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Bloodied Wastes
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Bloodied_Wastes
======================================================================

Bloodied Wastes
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
20-75
•
31-90
•
36-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Ruins of Abyd
Quests:
N/A
The
Bloodied Wastes
is a world area in
Act 7
and connects to the
Burning Spire
in the
Ruins of Abyd
.
The area forms part of the Ch'thonic Void and can be accessed by a Chthonic Rift, which can only be accessed during or after the
The Heart of Onarix
quest for the
Cult of Solael
. The player cannot cast a personal rift while in the Bloodied Wastes and must use another Chthonic Rift (located at the end of the area) to exit.
Interests
Hidden Trove
Creatures
Chthonic
Boss:
Onarix, the Razorhide
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Bonebleach Basin
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Bonebleach_Basin
======================================================================

Bonebleach Basin
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
50-75
•
75-90
•
90-200
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Cairan Docks
Quests:
-
Bonebleach Basin is an Easter Egg level in the
Forgotten Gods
Expansion. It has an entry point in the
Cairan Docks
which is unblocked during the
Crate Secret Quest
.
The Basin was once a seabed, but has long since dried up. The area is subject to sandstorms which cause damage over time to the player, but can be traversed by leeching life from the resident packs of Dromedary creatures, or by taking cover in one of several sheltered areas.
The Desert Altar requires the
Chillheart
Legendary sword to activate and leads to another secret level, the
Edge of Reality
.
Interests
Desert Altar
Dilapidated Urn - contains the
Fewmets of the Questing Beast
Epic Offhand item (A)
Dilapidated Urn - contains the
Fewmet Grips
Epic Gloves (B)
Notes:
Sea of Dust - Page 1
(C)
Sea of Dust - Page 2
(D)
Sea of Dust - Page 3
(E)

Bonebleach Dromedary

Broken Hills
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
22-45
•
54-70
•
73-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Barren Highlands
Old Arkovia
Twin Falls
The Steps of Torment
Quests:
Descent into Torment
The
Broken Hills
is an area in
Act 2
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Twin Falls
, the
Barren Highlands
and
Old Arkovia
, and features the entrance to the
Corrupted Tomb
and
The Steps of Torment
.

Burial Hill
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
4-7
•
5-65
•
6-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Lower Crossing
The Burial Cave
The Old Dump
Quests:
None
Burial Hill
is a world area in
Act 1
. It has connects to
Lower Crossing
and
The Old Dump
. The area also features the entrances to
The Burial Cave
.

Buried Crypt
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Rotting Croplands
Quests:
Trapped and Alone
The
Buried Crypt
is a small underground area in
Act 3
. It connects to the
Rotting Croplands
.
The  unmarked entrance is to the south of the Rotting Croplands Riftgate near a small Rover camp and needs to be uncovered using a
Detonation Site
.
Quests
Trapped and Alone
NPCs
Kalista

Burning Cellar
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
45-70
•
76-90
•
88-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Malmouth Outskirts
Quests:
n/a
The
Burning Cellar
is an underground area in
Act 6
It has two entrance/exit points in the
Malmouth Outskirts
.
Interests
Old Lectern - holds the
Dravis' Letter
quest item
Dynamite
Heroic Chest
Creatures
Aetherial
:
Aetherial Scamp, Aetherial Imp
Aetherial Corruption
:
Tainted Hound, Tainted Pack Leader

Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Architect of Flesh
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Boss:
Terrnox
- Aetherial Human boss

======================================================================
PAGE: Burrwitch Cathedral
CATEGORIES: Act 1 Locations

Burrwitch Cathedral
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
35-50
•
40-74
•
50-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
East Marsh
Quests:
N/A
Burrwitch Cathedral is a world area in
Act 1
added by the
Forgotten Gods
Expansion. It connects to
East Marsh
and is accessed by crossing the bridge in the north-east of the Marsh.
The area is infested with
Chthonian
Cultists and monsters.
Interests
Creatures
Boss:
Father Abaddoth, Betrayer of Menhir
Bloodsworn Adulant
Bloodsworn Zealot
Bloodsworn Priest
Bloodsworn Summoner
Bloodsworn Void-Caller
Bloodsworn Doomsayer
Chthonian Devourer
Chthonian Harbinger
Salazar's Harbinger
Obsidian Shaleborn
Voidfiend
Voidfiend Incinerator
Voidfiend Hellion

Burrwitch Estates
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-18
•
48-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Abandoned Waterfront
Burrwitch Village
The Warden's Cellar
Gloomwald
Quests:
None
Burrwitch Estates
is a world area
Act 1
. It connects to
Burrwitch Village
and the
Abandoned Waterfront
, and contains entrances to
Dank Cellar
,
Musty Cellar
and
The Warden's Cellar
. A bridge in the northeast connects to
Gloomwald
, the first area of the
Ashes of Malmouth
.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal/Elite)

Burrwitch Outskirts
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-18
•
46-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
The Flooded Passage
Foggy Bank
Burrwitch Village
Quests:
Tale of Two Blacksmiths
The Ironclad Chef
Burrwitch Outskirts
is an world area in
Act 1
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
The Flooded Passage
, the
Foggy Bank
and
Burrwitch Village
.
The area also contains entrances to
Depraved Sanctuary
,
Smuggler's Basin
,
The Burial Cave
and
Flooded Cellar
.
Interests
Journeyman's Pack
Untouched Meal
River Passage
Alister's Diary

Tale of Two Blacksmiths
The Ironclad Chef

Burrwitch Village
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-18
•
48-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Outskirts
Abandoned Waterfront
Burrwitch Estates
Mud Row
Quests:
A Cultist in the Midst
Burrwitch Village
is a world area in
Act 1
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Burrwitch Outskirts
,
Burrwitch Estates
,
Abandoned Waterfront
and
Mud Row
.
The area also contains entrances to
Flooded Cellar
and the
Infested Cellar
.

Untouched Meal

Cairan Docks
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Korvan Sands
Bonebleach Basin
Sandblown Ruins
Durg's Den
Sunbane Oasis
Quests:
-
The Cairan Docks is a world area in
Act 7
It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Korvan Sands
,
Sunbane Oasis
, and
Bonebleach Basin
. it also contains entrances to the
Sandblown Ruins
and
Durg's Den
.

Candle District
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
65-69
•
76-86
•
86-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Sewer Hideout
Malmouth Outskirts
Steelcap District
Quests:
Savior
The
Candle District
is a world area in
Act 6
. The slums of Malmouth, it connects to the Malmouth Resistance
Sewer Hideout
,
Steelcap District
and the
Malmouth Outskirts
.
Interests
Notes
:
Ripped Note - First Half
- inside a building
Ripped Note - Second Half
- on a corpse, "Katrine's Remains"
Letter to Councilman Cole
Rennoch the Rat's Warning
, on a corpse on the wall near the gate
Dynamite
Treasure Trove
(1 Dynamite)
Portcullis Control
Quests
Savior
NPCs
Quest
Nicoh Erin
Other
Nissa
Timor
Creatures
Human
:
Ascended - Attendant, Ascended Spellbreaker, Ascended Myrmidion
Aetherial
:
Aetherial Crystal Cluster, Aetherial Scamp, Aetherial Imp
Aetherial Corruption
:
Fleshwarped Imp, Tainted Hound, Tainted Pack Leader
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshweaver, Fleshwarped Abberation
Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Aetherial Guardian, Aetherial Sentinel
Corruption, Overseer
Boss:
Bollag, Keeper of the Gates

Cavern
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
8-12
•
45-60
•
70-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Foggy Bank
Quests:
None
Note: There are multiple Cavern areas. Please see
Cavern
for a list.
Cavern
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It has two entrance/exits in
Foggy Bank
.
The area is home to
Primordian, the Forgotten One
, a unique Slith Boss.

Untouched Meal
Slith Altar

======================================================================
PAGE: Cavern (Wightmire 1)
CATEGORIES: Act 1 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Cavern_(Wightmire_1)

Cavern
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
7-14
•
45-60
•
70-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Wightmire
Quests:
A Rover Rescue
Note: There are multiple Cavern areas. Please see
Cavern
for a list.
This
Cavern
is a small underground world area in
Act 1
. It has one entrance/exit, with three possible spawn point locations around
Wightmire
.
The cavern contains some
Convict
enemies and a small side quest.
Interests
Dirt-Covered Note
Ornate Strongbox
Untouched Meal
Quests
A Rover Rescue
NPCs
Jasper
Captive Rover
Creatures
Convict - Lackey
Convict - Thug
Convict - Brute
Convict - Sadist
Convict - Gunman
Convict - Skirmisher

Cavern
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
7-14
•
45-60
•
70-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Wightmire
Quests:
None
Note: There are multiple Cavern areas. Please see
Cavern
for a list.
Cavern
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It has two entrance/exits in
Wightmire
.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Rotting Corpse - contains the
Slithtongue
Rare Dagger
Untouched Meal

Rifthound - Azure Matriarch

======================================================================
PAGE: Challenge dungeon
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Challenge_dungeon
======================================================================

Challenge dungeons
are areas in
Grim Dawn
that contain some of the most difficult content of the game, and are intended to provide the player with a means to test their skills, as well as additional end-game and farming options. Numerous side-areas fall into this category, as well as the special "rogue-like" dungeons.
Rogue-like dungeons
At the pinnacle of challenge dungeons are "rogue-like" dungeons, which are named after the early predecessor of the modern action-RPG genre called "Rogue (1985)" . Rogue-likes are characterized by random layouts and permanent death that made the experience intense, and final victory all the more satisfying. Unless playing a hardcore character, death is not permanent in
Grim Dawn
, but
Crate
have tried to capture the thrill of rogue-likes in these special challenge dungeons by sealing the door upon entering and disabling
riftgates
so that there is no way out except by death or reaching the end.
A crafted
Skeleton Key
is required to unlock the door to a rogue-like dungeon each time the player enters. These dungeons are populated by various traps and numerous unique enemy heroes and bosses. Layout is also partially randomized, so that the player may not be able to take the same way through as the previous time, and treasures may not appear in the same locations.
There are five different rogue-like dungeons for the player to explore, each with their own theme and monster faction.
Steps of Torment
Main article:
Steps of Torment
The first challenge dungeon, the
Steps of Torment
, can be accessed in
Act 2
, with the entrance located in the
Broken Hills
. Populated by the
Undead
, this dungeon consists of 5 levels. Level 4 and 5 make up the rogue-like section.
Port Valbury
Main article:
Port Valbury
Port Valbury is found in
Act 3
. It is accessed via an Aetherial Rift that is located beyond the
Detonation Site
in
The Conflagration
. This dungeon is an above-ground zone over-run with
Aetherials
.
Bastion of Chaos
Main article:
Bastion of Chaos
Found at the end of
Act 4
, the Bastion of Chaos entrance located in the
Necropolis Interior
. Populated entirely by
Chthonians
, the dungeon has four levels, with levels 2 to 4 comprising the rogue-like section.
Ancient Grove
Main article:
Ancient Grove
The Ancient Grove is found in the southeast corner of
Ugdenbog
in
Act 5
. It is populated by
Beasts
. A
Skeleton Key
is required to enter the
Feral Thicket
and progress to the
Tainted Wood
.
Tomb of the Heretic
Main article:
Tomb of the Heretic
The Tomb of the Heretic is accessed via the
Lost Oasis
in
Act 7
. It consists of three levels, with a skeleton key required to access the final two. The
Paying Debts
quest leads the player to the tomb, but is not required to access it.

Chamber of the High Council
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
48-75
•
80-90
•
90-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Crown Hill
Quests:
-
The
Chamber of the High Council
is an interior world area in
Act 6
, and has a single entrance/exit in
Crown Hill
.
The area is locked until the player takes the
Rise of the Insurgence
quest for the
Malmouth Resistance
.
Interests
Note
:
Council Report to Theodin Marcell
Hidden Fleshwrapped Spoils - south from the north door behind crumbling wall
Creatures
Aetherial
:
Aetherial Scamp, Aetherial Imp
Aetherial Corruption
:
Fleshwarped Imp, Tainted Hound, Tainted Pack Leader
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshweaver, Fleshwarped Abberation
Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Aetherial Guardian, Aetherial Sentinel
Bosses:
Alberran Rein
Cyrian Marcan
Dreven Cole

======================================================================
PAGE: Cinder Wastes
CATEGORIES: Act 6 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Cinder_Wastes
======================================================================

Cinder Wastes
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
40-70
•
74-85
•
85-200
Riftgate:
no
Adjacent:
Mourndale
Fringes of Sanity
Quests:
-
The
Cinder Wastes
is a world area in
Act 6
. The area forms part of the Ch'thonic homeworld and can be accessed by a Chthonic Rift which spawns unmarked in three different locations around
Mourndale
.
Creatures in the Cinder Wastes are offset 2-4 levels above the player.
The player cannot cast a personal rift while in the Cinder Wastes and must find another
Chthonic
Rift to exit.
Interests
Treasure Trove
(needs 1
Dynamite
to open)
Hidden Trove - behind an obsidian wall directly right from the upper entrance rift
Chthonic Rift to
Fringes of Sanity
- near the center
Creatures
Chthonic
:
Chthonian Hungerer, Chthonian Devourer, Chthonian Gorger
Voidfiend, Voidfiend Incinerator, Voidfiend Hellion, Voidlurker Pestilence
Void Parasite, Void Leech, Void Souldrinker
Void Rylok, Void Taskmaster, Void Oppressor
Obsidian Shaleborn, Obsidian Defiler, Obsidian Ravager
Orudin'Idoth ~ Frozen - Obsidian Hero
Undead
:
Minion of Dravis
Boss:
Gabal'Thunn, the Visage of Madness
- Void Oppressor boss
Bandragos, Thrall of Dravis
- Undead boss

======================================================================
PAGE: Convict's Tunnel

Convict's Tunnel
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
7-14
•
9-68
•
11-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Devil's Crossing
Prison Dungeons
Quests:
None
Convict's Tunnel
is a small underground world area in
Act 1
. It connects to
Devil's Crossing
and the
Prison Dungeons
.
The tunnel can be accessed by a Trap Door located Devil's Crossing and unlocked during the
And Not a Drop to Drink
side quest.

Boneback

======================================================================
PAGE: Corrupted Tomb
CATEGORIES: Act 2 Locations

Corrupted Tomb
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
22-45
•
54-70
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Broken Hills
Quests:
N/A
The
Corrupted Tomb
is an underground side area in
Act 2
. It has a single entrance, located north of the
Broken Hills
Rift gate.
The area is a Dangerous Domain and will have one random Mutator active.
Interests
Potential location for a
One-shot chest
Note:
Ravings of Naren Kur
Creatures
Boss:
Naren Kur the Ostracized
Chthonic
:
Chthonian Hungerer
Chthonian Devourer
Chthonian Gorger
Voidfiend
Voidfiend Incinerator
Voidfiend Hellion
Chthonian Harbinger
Chthonian Bloodletter
Void Parasite
Void Leech

======================================================================
PAGE: Court of the Magi
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Court_of_the_Magi
======================================================================

Court of the Magi
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
26-75
•
50-90
•
70-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Tomb of the Heretic
Morgoneth's Folly
Quests:
-
Court of the Magi
is a world area in
Act 7
. It forms the second level of the
Tomb of the Heretic
"Roguelike"
Challenge Dungeon
.
The north-east of the map fearures a raised structure that houses the seven magi the area is named for. Two random magi will spawn inside.
Interests
Notes:
Morgoneth's Lessons - Page 2
Tuha's Report - Page 3

Coven's Refuge
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-65
•
68-80
•
82-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Gloomwald
Ugdenbog
Quests:
many
Coven's Refuge
is a world area in
Act 5
, and is the headquarters for the
Coven of Ugdenbog
Faction. The area has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Gloomwald
and
Ugdenbog
, and serves as the main hub or town for Act 5
Interests
Note
:
Trista's Diary
- in a Weathered Chest in the bottom left corner.

Craig's Crags
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
35-50
•
60-70
•
74-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
East Marsh
Quests:
None
Craig's Crags
is a world area in
Act 1
. It connects to
East Marsh
.

(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)

Crawling Nest
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Korvan Plateau
Quests:
-
The Crawling Nest is an underground area in
Act 7
. It has a single unmarked entrance west of the the
Korvan Plateau
Rift gate..
Interests
Hidden Remains

Insectoid
:
Korvan Scarab - Scavenger

Boss:

Cronley's Hideout
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
21-35
•
54-68
•
73-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Four Hills
Twin Falls
Quests:
Cronley's Secret
Annals of Arkovia
Cronley's Hideout
is an underground area in
Act 2
. It has a
Riftgate
and a single entrance in the
Four Hills
. There is also a one-way exit to
Twin Falls
at the very end of the area.
Cronley's Hideout contains several
Secret Areas
accessed via breakable walls.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Darius' Stash - a
One-Shot Chest
Notes
Urn Cluster - contains the
Annals of Arkovia
Note
Cronley's Notes - Part 1
Cronley's Notes - Part 2
Untouched Meal
Ornate Strongbox

Crown Hill
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
46-75
•
78-90
•
90-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Malmouth Harbor
Chamber of the High Council
The Infestation
Quests:
The Living Factory
Crown Hill
is a world area in
Act 6
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Malmouth Harbor
and
The Infestation
. it also contains the entrance to
the
Chamber of the High Council
.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Treasure Trove
Hidden Remains
(behind the shrine between two houses)
Notes
:
From the Office of Councilman Cole
Letter to Theodin Marcell
Letter to Ronald Marion
Quests
The Living Factory

Crumbling Watch
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
19-23
•
52-65
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Arkovian Foothills
Quests:
None
The
Crumbling Watch
is a side area in
Act 2
and connects to the
Arkovian Foothills
, east of the Riftgate. The area consists of a small ruins populated by
Undead
.
Interests
Note:
Dust Covered Journal

Cultist's Lair
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
9-13
•
46-60
•
71-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Foggy Bank
Quests:
A Sacrifice
The
Cultist's Lair
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It is accessed by a Trap Door inside a house in the
Foggy Bank
. The Trap Door is unmarked on the world Map.
Interests
Missive to Wightmire Bloodbound
Quests
A Sacrifice
NPCs
Isaac
Creatures
Bloodsworn Adulant
Bloodsworn Priest
Bloodsworn Zealot

Dank Cellar
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-18
•
48-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Estates
Quests:
None
Dank Cellar
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It has three entrances in
Burrwitch Estates
.
Interests
Darlet
Ornate Strongbox
Breakable Wall - secret room contains an Untouched Meal and some small chests.
Treasure Trove
(Elite/Ultimate difficulty)

Corruption
Walking Dead
Plague Walker

======================================================================
PAGE: Darkvale Gate
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations, Riftgate Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Darkvale_Gate
======================================================================

Darkvale Gate
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
33-48
•
62-70
•
76-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Village of Darkvale
Asterkarn Road
Quests:
None
Darkvale Gate
is an area in
Act 3
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Village of Darkvale
.
The area is a dungeon with two levels and a stronghold of the Cult of Ch'thon. It is the final area of Act 3 and contains the Act 3 Boss,
Karroz, Sigil of Ch'thon
.
Interests
Blood for Ch'thon
- note on a lectern in the western corner of level 1.
Karroz's Chest - a
One-Shot Chest
in the boss room, second level.
Breakable Walls
There are five secret areas containing loot that can be accessed by breakable walls. Precise locations are shown on the maps below.
First level:
right next to a set of stairs.
at the end of a hallway close to the exit to level 2 (the map below has the marker in the wrong spot, the real spot is just a bit south east)
Southern most corner of the area containing the entrance to level 2
Second Level:
in a room behind a breakable cupboard.
in the western corner of the first section.
Just across the large bridge  and to the left.
Creatures
Chthonic
:
Chtonian Hungerer
Chthonian Gorger
Chthonian Devourer
Voidfiend
Voidfiend Incinerator
Voidfiend Hellion
Obsidian Shaleborn
Obsidian Defiler
Obsidian Ravager
Human
:
Bloodsworn Adulant
Bloodsworn Zealot
Bloodsworn Summoner
Bloodsworn Void-Caller
Bloodsworn Doomsayer
Boss:
Karroz, Sigil of Ch'thon
Gallery
Level 1
Level 2

======================================================================
PAGE: Deadman's Gulch
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations, Riftgate Locations

======================================================================

Deadman's Gulch
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
26-40
•
56-68
•
74-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Smuggler's Pass
Mountain Deeps
Quests:
A Timely Arrival
Too Late for Rescue
Deadman's Gulch
is a small
Act 3
area. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Smuggler's Pass
and the
Mountain Deeps
.
To the east can be found a gully full of Aetherfire. Halfway along the gully there is a trail branching off to a small side area with several Manticores.
It terminates in a mine entrance leading to
The Immolation
, which is unlocked during the
Legion Retribution
Act 4 side-quest.
Interests
Mine Entrance -
Sealed by the Black Legion.
Quests
A Timely Arrival
Too Late for Rescue
NPCs
Ulgrim
Collin Taverin
Beatrice Summers
Rob Halloway
Tricia Windborough
Taris Windborough
Emily Larkson
Creatures
Aether Corruption
:
Beastkin
:
Mistborn Brute

Stonewart Troll
Beast
:
Manticore Whitemane
Manticore Wastestalker

======================================================================
PAGE: Decrepit Cellar

Decrepit Cellar
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
36-62
•
65-80
•
71-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Gloomwald
Quests:
n/a
The
Decrepit Cellar
is an underground area in
Act 5
. It has two entrances in
Gloomwald
.
Avris Marrowill can sometimes be found here or usually in the
Overgrown Cellar
.
Interests
Treasure Trove
- needs 1 Dynamite
Wendigo Altar (special chest)
Path behind breakable furniture with Hidden remains
Creatures
Ugdenbog Wretch, Ugdenbog Turned, Ugdenbog Marked
Ugdenbog Crab, Ugdenbog Spikeshell
Ugdenbog Cannibal - Fleshcrazed, Ugdenbog Cannibal - Bloodsinger
Poisonous Bloom
Voracious Growth
Wendigo - Flayer
Boss:
Avris Marrowill
- Ugdenbog cannibal that summons Ancient Wraiths

======================================================================
PAGE: Den of Carraxus
CATEGORIES: Act 5 Locations

Den of Carraxus
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
36-62
•
65-80
•
71-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Gloomwald
Quests:
Desperate Measures
The
Den of Carraxus
is an underground area in
Act 5
, with a single door in the northeast corner of
Gloomwald
. It consists of a large cave area and is home of
Carraxus Foul
, target for the quest
Desperate Measures
.
Interests
Creatures
Ugdenbog Crab
,
Ugdenbog Spikeshell
,
Ugdenbog Stoneshell
,
Ugdenbog Crabling
Iceskorn - Ugdenbog Crab Hero
Haunted Spikeshell
Ugdenbog Golem
,
Ugdenbog Mossflinger
Gaarl ~ Voidtouched - Ugdenbog Golem Hero
Boss:
Carraxus Foul
- Ugdenbog Crab boss

Area Map
Outside the Den

======================================================================
PAGE: Den of the Ancient

Den of the Ancient
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
70-82
•
85-120
Riftgate:
no
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Quests:
n/a
The
Den of the Ancient
is a small side area in
Act 5
. It connects to
Ugdenbog
, and is accessed by a bridge that needs to be unblocked using 3
Dynamite
.
The Den is home to some
Slith
and the Boss creature
Kra'vall, Ancient of the Waters
.
Interests
Note:
Mysteries of Ugdenbog
One-Shot Chest
Water-Logged Chest
Creatures
Bloodscale Warrior
Bloodscale Berserker
Bloodscale Conquer0r
Bloodscale Warlock
Bloodscale Witch Doctor
Boss
Kra'vall, Ancient of the Waters

======================================================================
PAGE: Den of the Lost

Den of the Lost
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-50
•
60-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Skittering Den
Quests:
None
Den of the Lost
is a secret underground area in
Act 3
. The entrance can be found behind a breakable wall in the
Skittering Den
.
The area is inhabited by several packs of
Trogs
and
Gollus, the Deepdweller
, a Unique Boss Creature hoarding a Supreme Chest.
Creatures in Den of the Lost are offset 3 levels above the player.
Tutorial video
to access the secret area.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Supreme Chest
Creatures
Trog Blood Drinker
Trog Flesh Ripper
Trog Blood Mage
Deepdweller Grub
Boss:
Gollus, the Deepdweller

Den of the Wendigo
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
70-82
•
85-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Forlorn Cellar
Quests:
-
The Den of the Wendigo is an underground area in
Act 5
. It has one entrance/exit located in the
Forlorn Cellar
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Depraved Sanctuary
CATEGORIES: Act 1 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Depraved_Sanctuary
======================================================================

Depraved Sanctuary
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
18-40
•
55-65
•
74-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Outskirts
Quests:
None
Depraved Sanctuary
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. The area is a challenging dungeon located east of the
Burrwitch Outskirts
riftgate. It is inhabited by large numbers of
Bloodsworn
cultists and their
chthonic
minions.
Entry is gained by means of a locked iron door; to unlock it you must be in possession of the
Strange Key
, which can be obtained in two ways:
As a reward when allowing
Direni
to live in the quest
A Cultist in the Midst
.
As a random drop from cultists in the area (guaranteed from the hero cultist who has a chance of spawning in the Southern most area of the base) or in the
Cultist's Lair
.
Interests
Untouched Meal
One-Shot Chest
Ornate Strongbox
Grand Chest
Salazar, Blade of Ch'thon
(Boss)
Caspis, The Blooddrinker
(Bounty spawn only)
Creatures
Bloodsworn Adulant
Bloodsworn Zealot
Bloodsworn Priest
Bloodsworn Summoner

Bloodsworn Doomsayer
Chthonian Devourer
Chthonian Harbinger
Salazar's Harbinger
Obsidian Shaleborn
Voidfiend
Voidfiend Incinerator
Voidfiend Hellion
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Desolate Wastes
CATEGORIES: Act 5 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Desolate_Wastes

Desolate Wastes
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
40-70
•
74-85
•
85-200
Riftgate:
no
Adjacent:
Altar of Rattosh
Void's Edge
Quests:
n/a
The
Desolate Wastes
is a world area in
Act 5
and connects to the
Void's Edge
. The area forms part of the Ch'thonic Void and can be accessed by a Chthonic Rift at the
Altar of Rattosh
in
Ugdenbog
.
The player cannot cast a personal rift while in the Desolate Wastes and must find another Chthonic Rift to exit.
Interests
One-Shot Chest
- 3 possible spawn points on the north, east and western edges.
Hidden Trove (see player's position on the map below)
Creatures
Chthonic
:
Voidfiend
Voidfiend Incinerator

======================================================================
PAGE: Detonation Site
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Detonation_Site
======================================================================

Detonation Sites are places you can use
Dynamite
to remove a roadblock or uncover a cave entrance. Doing so allows access to more areas.
Location
# Req'd
Lower Crossing
2
The Flooded Passage
3
Mud Row
1
Arkovian Foothills
1
New Harbor
1
Prospector's Trail
3
The Conflagration
3
Rotting Croplands
1
Morton's Claim
1
Fort Ikon
-

Devil's Aquifer
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
7-14
•
9-68
•
11-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Prison Dungeons
Quests:
None
Devil's Aquifer
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It connects to the
Prison Dungeons
.

This article is about the location. For the faction that currently inhabits it, see
Devil's Crossing (faction)
.
Devil's Crossing
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
1-4
•
45-60
•
70-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Lower Crossing
Convict's Tunnel
Arkovian Foothills
Old Grove
Quests:
Many
Devil's Crossing
is a world area in
Act 1
, and where every character begins the game.
The area is made up of an old Prison where various human survivors of the Grim Dawn have taken refuge. The inside of the prison, along with a few outlying buildings, makes up the starting town and central point from which the wider world of
Cairn
can be explored.
Lore
"I was a prisoner here back when this place still served as an actual prison. When the world went down the slith hole, I stayed here with a few others; it was the safest place I could think of. Clearly Bourbon thought the same when he showed up with the rest of the survivors. Things escalated quickly. I'm sure it was us who fired first, but it was them that fired the last. Those prisoners that survived were driven out and 'set free'. Now call me a coward for all I care, but I hid when the fighting got ugly. Came out later looking like another refugee and no one was the wiser. Never could forgive Bourbon for what he did to us though." -
Direni
Interests
Riftgate
Bridge Repair Site
Crudely Scrawled Note
NPCs
Devil's Crossing is home to a number of
NPCs
who can provide services and
quests
for the player. Some are located in Devil's Crossing at the beginning of the game, while others need to found or rescued in other areas of the game world.

PAGE: Discord

This article is about the location. For the
Soldier
skill, see
Discord (Skill)
.
Discord
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Bastion of Chaos
Anarchy
Quests:
N/A
Discord
is a world area in
Act 4
and the second level of the
Bastion of Chaos
.
The final part of the area features the  "
Fields of Despair
" with several rooms that release numerous waves of enemies at the player. Finishing the Fields of Despair for the first time will grant the
achievement
of the same name.
Creatures in Discord are offset 3-4 levels above the player.
Interests
Obsidian Trove
Breakable Wall - South side of final island cluster on SE side of map
Creatures
Chthonian Hungerer
Chthonian Gorger

Void Souldrinker

Durg's Den
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Cairan Docks
Quests:
-
Durg's Den is a small underground area in
Act 7
, with a single entrance south west of the
Cairan Docks
Riftgate. The Den is home to  a single Boss monster,
Durg the Stormborn
.
Interests
Creatures
Insectoid
:
Korvan Scarab - Scavenger
Korvan Scarab - Gorger
Korvan Scarab - Incubator
Boss:
Durg the Stormborn

PAGE: East Marsh

East Marsh
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
35-50
•
60-70
•
74-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Mud Row
Craig's Crags
Quests:
None
The
East Marsh
is a world area in
Act 1
. it is a large side area that connects to
Mud Row
and
Craig's Crags
.
Although located in Act 1, it is usually necessary to have completed at least some of
Act 2
to access as
Dynamite
is required to clear debris (Dynamite drops in Act 1 are possible, but very rare), and then 10
Scrap
and 8000 Iron Bits are required to repair the bridge.
Interests
Muddy Note
Creatures
Boss:
Balegor, the Swamp King
Galeslice the Ruthless
Beastkin
:
Plaguewart Troll
Plaguewart Rager
Plaguewart Behemoth
Insectoid
:
Mireborn Bloodgorger
Mireborn Bloodfiend
Devouring Swarm
Riftspawn
:
Briarthorn Horror
Briarthorn Terror
Plaguehound
Plaguehound ~ Roteater
Plaguehound ~ Alpha

Edge of Madness
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Seal of the Loghorrean
Quests:
None
Edge of Madness
is a world area in
Act 4
, and connects to the
Seal of the Loghorrean
.
This area comprises the last level of the final three-level dungeon and contains Grim Dawn's final Boss.
Interests
Obsidian Trove
Loghorrean's Corruption (chest)
NPCs
Ulgrim
Creatures
Boss:
Loghorrean, the Voice of Ch'thon

Edge of Reality
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Sanctum of the Immortal
Quests:
No
The Edge of Reality is a world area in
Act 4
. It connects to the
Sanctum of the Immortal
.
The area is a hidden easter-egg on Ultimate difficulty only, and is accessed by completing the
secret quest
relating to
Daila Thornsbury
and her sword
Stormheart
.
The player encounters various creatures including Trolls, Trogs, Aether Corruptions, Dermapterans and Chthonics before reaching the final Boss room.
Interests
Clone's Trove (2)
NPCs
John Bourbon
Creatures
Clone of John Bourbon
Burning Clone of John Bourbon
Frozen Clone of John Bourbon
Electrified Clone of John Bourbon
Tainted Clone of John Bourbon
Deathly Clone of John Bourbon
Corrupted Clone of John Bourbon
The Final Form of the Clone of John Bourbon
The Actually Final Form of the Clone of John Bourbon
Trivia
The Clone of John Bourbon is an in-joke dating back to the Early Access period of development. Prior to the game's completion, when the player came to the end of existing content they would encounter the Clone of John Bourbon, an NPC who would inform the player they had completed all current content and could go no further.

======================================================================
PAGE: Edge of Reality (Act 6)
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Edge_of_Reality_(Act_6)
======================================================================

Edge of Reality
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
n/a
•
n/a
•
80-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Sanctum of the Chosen
Crucible of the Dead
Quests:
none
The Edge of Reality is a
secret area
in
Act 6
.
The area is a hidden easter-egg on Ultimate difficulty only, and is accessed by completing
Lokarr's Secret Quest
.
The Area contains a secret path leads to the
Root of All Evil
, which when defeated will open an Aetherial Rift to the
Sanctum of the Chosen
.
Interests
Clone's Trove
Rift-Claimed Adherent
- there are four such Hero Creatures in the area, each one dropping a different piece of the
Dark One's Gift
item set. (In order,  head, chest, hand and shoulder pieces.)
NPCs
Not a Clone of John Bourbon
Creatures
Root of All Evil
Rift-Claimed Adherent
Gallery
Masteries

Elmsworth Farm
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-40
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Thornsbury Farm
Homestead
Quests:
none
Elmsworth Farm
is a small area in
Act 3
.
After completing the
Infested Fields
quest the area is secured by the
Black Legion
and inhabited by
Henry Elmsworth
and some Homestead Farmers.
Interests
Journeyman's Pack - inside a house in the lower east corner.
Creatures
Dermapteran Weavil
Dermapteran Sentinel
Dermapteran Reaver
Dermapteran Vizier
Devouring Swarm

======================================================================
PAGE: Entropy
CATEGORIES: Act 4 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Entropy
======================================================================

Entropy
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Anarchy
Quests:
N/A
Entropy
is a world area in
Act 4
and the fourth and final level of the
Bastion of Chaos
.
The Unique Boss
Shar'Zul, Harbinger of Chaos
resides at the end of the level. Defeating him unlocks a treasure room which contains a Transcendant Chest and an Obsidian Wealth, as well as a Chthonic Rift which teleports the player to the surface near the Bastion of Chaos entrance.
Creatures in Entropy are offset 5-6 levels above the player.
Interests
Transcendent Chest
Obsidian Wealth
NPCs
Karros Adal - Wares of the Damned
(unless it is in
Anarchy
)

Fallow Fields
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
30-43
•
60-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Homestead
Sorrow's Bastion
Quests:
None
The
Fallow Fields
is an area in
Act 3
. It is situated between
Homestead
and
Sorrow's Bastion
and is occupied by Chthonic cultists and their minions. The gate from Homestead is opened after completion of the
The Way North
quest.
Interests
Journeyman's Pack
Creatures
Chthonic
:
Chtonian Hungerer
Chthonian Gorger

Voidfiend

Bloodsworn Adulant
Bloodsworn Zealot
Bloodsworn Summoner
Bloodsworn Void-Caller
Bloodsworn Doomsayer

======================================================================
PAGE: Feral Thicket
CATEGORIES: Act 5 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Feral_Thicket
======================================================================

Feral Thicket
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
50-75
•
70-85
•
95-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Ancient Grove
Tainted Wood
Quests:
n/a
The
Feral Thicket
is a
Challenge Dungeon
in
Act 5
and is accessed from the
Ancient Grove
. A
Skeleton Key
is required to open the gate to the Feral Thicket. The area has a +4/5/5 monster level offset.
The
Trial of Corruption
is an Aether corrupted area located in the southwest area of the Feral Thicket. Entering the corruption triggers multiple waves of enemies. Clearing all the waves results in the achievement
Trial of Corruption
.
Interests
Trial of Corruption - challenge room. When defeated, the chest will contain an Epic Item.
Vinelton - All Natural Wares
is a Plant merchant selling Ugdenbog items, recipes, and blueprints
Ancient Sarcophagus (by Slathsarr)
Secret area inside a ruined tower - holds Hidden Spoils behind Crumbling Wall, in the north area due west from the exit to the Tainted Wood
Creatures
Ugdenbog creatures plus Chthonic and Aether Corruption versions
Bosses:
Gulgazor
(Crab Boss)
Slathsarr Aethergaze
(Basilisk Beast Boss)

Festering Lair
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
18-23
•
52-65
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Abandoned Waterfront
Quests:
None
The
Festering Lair
is a small underground world area in
Act 1
. The entrance is located in the
Abandoned Waterfront
.
Beware the toxic water!
Interests
Monsters Hoard - a
One-Shot Chest
.
Creatures
Beast
:
Boneback
Rabid Boneback

Scavenger Alpha
Boss:
Grundleplith the Hoarder

Fleshworks
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
48-75
•
80-90
•
92-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Infestation
Sanctum of Flesh
Quests:
Burn the Womb
Fleshworks
is an underground area in
Act 6
. It connects to
The Infestation
and the
Sanctum of Flesh
.
Interests
Aetherial Rift to
Crown Hill
Notes:
Birthing Success
- drop from
Fleshweaver Krieg
Katrine's note to Alice
- drop from
Katrine's Remains
, near
Fleshweaver Krieg
Hidden spoil at eastern side
Quests
Burn the Womb
NPCs
Hagarond
Creatures
Aetherial
:
Aetherial Scamp, Aetherial Imp
Ascended - Attendant, Ascended Spellbreaker
Aetherial Corruption
:
Aetherial Bloatworm, Aetherial Iceburrower, Aetherial Rotbellower, Aetherial Blazedrinker, Aetherial Stormdrinker
Tainted Hound, Tainted Pack Leader
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshweaver, Fleshwarped Abberation
Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Architect of Flesh
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Aetherial Stormbearer
Bosses:
Fleshweaver Krieg
- northwest by the Womb area
Hagalvar, the Bone Monger
- near the door to the Sanctum of Flesh
Rodalgar, the Flesh Collector
- east side

Flooded Cellar
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-15
•
47-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Village
Moldering Fields
Quests:
None
Flooded Cellar
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It has 3 entrance/exits, located in
Burrwitch Village
and the
Moldering Fields
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Foggy Bank
CATEGORIES: Act 1 Locations, Riftgate Locations

Foggy Bank
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
8-12
•
45-60
•
70-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Wightmire
Sodden Hollow
Burrwitch Outskirts
The Flooded Passage
Quests:
The Lost Caravan
The
Foggy Bank
is a world area in
Act 1
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Wightmire
,
Sodden Hollow
,
Burrwitch Outskirts
and
The Flooded Passage
.
The area contains entrances to the
Cultist's Lair
and a
Cavern
. There is also a broken bridge that can be repaired for 3 scrap and 5000 iron bits to reach Burrwitch Outskirts, or alternatively the Flooded Passage can be taken.
Interests
Journeyman's pack
Isaac's Stash
Ornate Strongbox
Bridge Repair Site

The Lost Caravan

Forgotten Cellar
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Conclave of the Three
Quests:
N/A
The Forgotten Cellar is a world area in
Act 7
. It can be accessed by a hidden entrance behind the
Cult of Dreeg
Faction Vendor in the
Conclave of the Three
.
The cellar is the initial location for the
Crate Secret Quest
on Ultimate difficulty.
Interests
Hidden Spoils
Dilapidated Urn - contains the
Web is Spun
note.
Unassuming Crate (Ultimate)

Forgotten Depths
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
30-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Shaded Basin
Quests:
None
The
Forgotten Depths
is a small underground area in
Act 3
. It has two entrance/exits located in the
Shaded Basin
, and also has a one-way entrance from
Bloodbriar's Lair
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal only)

======================================================================
PAGE: Forlorn Bastion
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Forlorn_Bastion
======================================================================

Forlorn Bastion
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
24-75
•
35-90
•
45-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Korvan Plateau
Quests:
-
The Forlorn Bastion is a secret world area in
Act 7
. It can be accessed via a hidden path south of the
Korvan Sands
riftgate, on the west side of the trail, right after crossing the border to the
Korvan Plateau
.
The area is the location for finding the
Second Seal of Morgoneth
for the
Paying Debts
quest.
Interests
Hidden Spoils
Treasure Trove
Notes:
Journal of Captain Fhaud - Page 1
Journal of Captain Fhaud - Page 2
Journal of Captain Fhaud - Page 3
Creatures
Eldritch
:
Animated Keeper
Animated Watcher
Animated Preserver
Possessed Armor
Eldritch Armor
Ancient Armor
Eldritch Spirit
Eldritch Spirit - Haunt
Eldritch Spirit - Ancient
Undead

Forlorn Cellar
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
70-82
•
85-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Den of the Wendigo
Quests:
-
The Forlorn Cellar is an underground area in
Act 5
. It has one entrance/exit located just outside
Barrowholm
in
Ugdenbog
. The Cellar can only be accessed after killing
Scorv Egdenor
during the
A Witch's Bargain
quest.
Interests
Note
:
Through Flesh We Become His Chosen
Creatures
Ugdenbog Cannibal - Fleshcrazed
Ugdenbog Cannibal - Bloodsinger
Ugdenbog Cannibal - Wraithspeaker
Ugdenbog Wretch
Ugdenbog Turned
Ugdenbog Marked
Wendigo
Wendigo - Flayer
Wendigo - Marroweater
Wendigo - Ancient
Wraith
Spiteful Wraith
Ancient Wraith

======================================================================
PAGE: Fort Haron
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations

Fort Haron
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
31-45
•
60-70
•
76-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Blood Grove
Quests:
None
Fort Haron
is an area in
Act 3
, located north of the
Blood Grove
Riftgate. The Fort has both exterior and interior areas.
Depending on whether the player sided with
Kymon's Chosen
or the
Order of Death's Vigil
in the
Allies Among the Ashes
quest, Fort Haron will be occupied by the opposing faction.
Interests
Untouched Meal
Dynamite

Kymon's Chosen
Zealot
Stormbearer
Blade Maiden
Boss:
Sister Bravna, the Skybreaker
Death's Vigil
Neophyte
Acolyte
Dreadlord
Boss:
Master Ravok, the Death's Whisper
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Fort Ikon

Fort Ikon
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
34-60
•
64-70
•
78-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Asterkarn Valley
Tomb of Archon Barthollem
Fort Ikon Prison
Fort Ikon Armory
Plains of Strife
Quests:
Many
Fort Ikon
is a world area in
Act 4
, and serves as the main town or hub. The area has a Riftgate and connects to
Asterkarn Valley
and the
Plains of Strife
, as well as the
Tomb of Archon Barthollem
,
Fort Ikon Prison
and
Fort Ikon Armory
.
Interests
The Black Legion Bounty Table
Notes
:
Praetorian's Report
Journal of Inquisitor Creed - 9th Entry
Black Legion Scouting Report: Necropolis
Detonation Site
Hidden Area - Behind some trees right of the road after you descend the stairs at the entrance of Fort Ikon
Breakable Wall - To the right of the Fort Ikon Armory entrance
Quests
Betrayal at Fort Ikon
The Necropolis
The Bane of Cairn
Precious Resources
The Aetherial Witch

Legion Retribution
A Stranger Beckons
The Emissary

Fort Ikon Armory
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
34-60
•
64-70
•
78-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Fort Ikon
Quests:
none
Fort Ikon Armory is an
Act 4
area and connects to
Fort Ikon
.
The Armory contains a small secret room in the center of the area, accessed by  a breakable wall. Another small secret room is located by the north-east corner, also accessed by a breakable wall.
Interests
Note:
Compilation of Fort Ikon Reports
Note:
Armory Explosion Investigation
Legion Supplies
- quest item
Dynamite
Ornate Strongbox

======================================================================
PAGE: Fort Ikon Prison
CATEGORIES: Act 4 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Fort_Ikon_Prison
======================================================================

Fort Ikon Prison
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
34-60
•
64-70
•
78-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Fort Ikon
Quests:
N/A
Fort Ikon Prison
is an interior world area in
Act 4
and connects to
Fort Ikon
. The area is the headquarters for the
Outcast
faction.
The area is accessible after accepting the
The Aetherial Witch
side quest. A larger dungeon area lies beyond the sealed Iron Gate in the first room, unlocked only after choosing to kill
Anasteria
in the Aetherial Witch quest.
Note: To get past the Iron Gate and access the inner dungeon, it is necessary to start a new game session after killing
Anasteria
the first time.
Interests
The Outcast's Bounty Table
NPCs
Anasteria
Anasteria's Drudge (Faction vendor)

Four Hills
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
20-25
•
53-65
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Cronley's Hideout
Hanneffy Mine
New Harbor
Old Arkovia
Quests:
None
Four Hills
is an area in
Act 2
and the stronghold for
Cronley's Gang
. It connects to
Old Arkovia
,
New Harbor
,
Cronley's Hideout
and
Hanneffy Mine
.
The unique boss
Boris, Master of the Pit
spawns inside the fighting pit in the north-west corner of the area.
Interests
Untouched Meal
Outlaw Forge
Dynamite
NPCs
Frankie "the Knife"
Cronley's Gang Deserter
Creatures
Cronley's Gang
:
Cronley's Gang - Gunman
Cronley's Gang - Lackey
Cronley's Gang - Thug
Cronley's Gang - Arsonist
Cronley's Gang - Brute
Cronley's Gang - Murderer
Cronley's Gang - Sadist
Cronley's Gang - Skirmisher
Boss:
Boris, Master of the Pit
Rekt Byprotoss, Champion of the Pit
Acedian Aldric, Champion of the Pit
Undead
Skeletal Archer
Skeletal Warrior
Skeletal Knight
Skeletal Priest
Skeletal Warlock

PAGE: Fringes of Sanity

Fringes of Sanity
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
40-70
•
74-85
•
85-100
Riftgate:
no
Adjacent:
Cinder Wastes
Quests:
The Bloodsworn Damned
The
Fringes of Sanity
is a world area in
Act 6
. and can be accessed by a Chthonic Rift which spawns in the middle of the
Cinder Wastes
.
The Chthonic Rift for the Cinder Wastes spawns unmarked in three different locations around
Mourndale
.
Creatures in the Fringes of Sanity are offset 2-4 levels above the player.
The player cannot cast a personal rift while in the Fringes of Sanity and must kill Lunal'Valgoth, Steward of Darkness to reveal the Chthonic Rift to exit.
Interests
Hidden Trove - go all the way to the right in the middle section
NPCs
Bloodsworn Nimia
Quests
The Bloodsworn Damned
Creatures
Chthonic
:
Chthonian Hungerer, Chthonian Devourer, Chthonian Gorger
Voidfiend, Voidfiend Incinerator, Voidfiend Hellion, Voidlurker Pestilence
Void Parasite, Void Leech, Void Souldrinker
Chthonian Vanguard, Chthonian Harbinger, Chthonian Dreadguard, Chthnonian Tyrant
Obsidian Shaleborn, Obsidian Defiler, Obsidian Ravager
Chthonian Servitor, Chthonian Harvester, Chthonian Bloodkeeper
Void Rylok, Void Taskmaster, Void Oppressor
Boss:
Lunal'Valgoth, Steward of Darkness - Chthonic Insectoid boss

Gates of Necropolis
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
35-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Plains of Strife
Necropolis Interior
The Black Sepulcher
Quests:
None
The
Gates of Necropolis
is a world area in
Act 4
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Plains of Strife
and the
Necropolis Interior
, and also contains the entrance to
The Black Sepulcher
.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal Only)
Notes
:
Commission of the Necropolis - Page 1
Commission of the Necropolis - Page 2
NPCs
Horrus - Cursed Smith

======================================================================
PAGE: Gloomwald
CATEGORIES: Act 5 Locations

Gloomwald
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
36-62
•
65-80
•
71-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Estates
Coven's Refuge
Quests:
The Gloomwald Stash
Gloomwald'
is a world area in
Act 5
. It has two
Riftgates
and connects to the
Burrwitch Estates
and
Coven's Refuge
. It also contains entrances to the following underground areas:
Decrepit Cellar
- doors northeast from the Gloomwald Riftgate and south from the Shrine
Overgrown Cellar
- entrance is southwest from Gloomwald Crossing Riftgate
Den of Carraxus
- located in the far north part of Gloomwald
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal/Ultimate)
One-Shot Chest
- Nane's Stash
Hidden Spoils southwest (7 o clock) of the Den of Carraxus entrance
Notes
:
Nane's Stash
Cratch Moore's Order
Quests
The Gloomwald Stash
NPCs
Small Rover camp near Gloomwald Riftgate
Roving Merchant - Salvage Dealer
Ralkama
Wuulavaia
Rover Protector
Garett Torven
Creatures
Boss
Dralgar, the Keeper of Burrwitch
- Aether Corruption after crossing bridge from Burrwitch Estates
Packla, the Turning
- Wendigo boss east from Garett Torven
Beast
:
Ugdenbog Crab, Ugdenbog Spikeshell, Ugdenbog Stoneshell, Ugdenbog Crabling
Vileclaw - Crab Hero
Undead
- Human
Ugdenbog Wretch, Ugdenbog Turned , Ugdenbog Marked
Human
:
Ugdenbog Cannibal - Fleshcrazed, Ugdenbog Cannibal - Bloodsinger, Ugdenbog - Wraithspeaker
Eldritch
Plant:
Carnivorous Plant, * Poisonous Bloom, * Voracious Growth
Thunderbloom - Electrified (Hero)
Ugdenbog Golem, Ugdenbog Mossflinger, Ugdenbog Overgrowth
Undead
Beast:
Haunted Crab, Haunted Spikeshell
Wendigo, Wendigo Marroweater, Wendigo - Flayer, Wendigo - Ancient
Undead
:
Wraith, Spiteful Wraith, Ancient Wraith
Aether Corruption
:
Walking Dead, Plague Walker, Burning Dead, Rotting Emberguard

Gryver's Mill
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
31-45
•
60-70
•
76-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Blood Grove
Shrine of the Forgotten God
Village of Darkvale
Quests:
None
Gryver's Mill
is a world area in
Act 3
. It connects to
The Blood Grove
to the east and
Village of Darkvale
to the north-west. It also connects to
Shrine of the Forgotten God
through a hidden passage behind a waterfall located near the southernmost part of the area.
Interests
Access to the
Shrine of the Forgotten God
secret area
Creatures
Quests
Lumber for the Legion

======================================================================
PAGE: Hallowed Hill
CATEGORIES: Act 1 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Hallowed_Hill
======================================================================

Hallowed Hill
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
18-40
•
55-65
•
74-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
River Passage
Quests:
None
Hallowed Hill
is a "secret" world area in
Act 1
, and is accessed through the
River Passage
.
To find the entrance, head northeast from
Burrwitch Village
Riftgate until you cross the large bridge leading to
Burrwitch Estates
. As soon as you cross the bridge, turn left down the small steps and double back under the bridge. If the steps are blocked you will have to go through the house nearby. The unmarked cave entrance can be found just after passing under the bridge.
Interests

======================================================================
PAGE: Hanneffy Mine
CATEGORIES: Act 2 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Hanneffy_Mine
======================================================================

Hanneffy Mine
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
21-35
•
54-68
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Four Hills
Quests:
None
Hanneffy Mine
is an underground world area in
Act 2
. There are two marked entrances located in
Old Arkovia
and the
Four Hills
,
as well as an unmarked one beyond the Demolition Site in
New Harbor
.
The mine has one
secret area
that can be accessed by destroying a wooden wall in the northeast.
Interests
Wilkins' Note
Dynamite
Creatures
Cronley's Gang - Gunman
Cronley's Gang - Lackey
Cronley's Gang - Arsonist
Cronley's Gang - Brute
Cronley's Gang - Heretic
Cronley's Gang - Sadist
Cronley's Gang - Skirmisher
Hallion's Wittle Rat
Boss:
Halion "The Rat"

Hargate's Isle
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
6-9
•
8-65
•
10-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Lower Crossing
Hargate's Laboratory
Quests:
None
Hargate's Isle
is a world area in
Act 1
. It is a small island accessed by clicking on a Rowboat found in
Lower Crossing
.
The isle is infested with large numbers of
Slith
.
Interests
Hargate's Journal - Page 1
Trap Door - can only be opened as part of
The Origin of the Slith
quest.

======================================================================
PAGE: Hargate's Laboratory
CATEGORIES: Act 1 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Hargate's_Laboratory
======================================================================

Hargate's Laboratory
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
30-50
•
48-76
•
70-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Hargate's Isle
Quests:
None
Hargate's Laboratory
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It can be accessed by a Trap Door on
Hargate's Isle
after accepting
The Origin of the Slith
quest.
The area has two levels and contains large sections of floor covered in poisonous water which can cause damage, likely a byproduct of long-term
Slith
occupation as the species is well-known for poisoning the water sources where they reside. Indeed, this is the species's place of origin, as referenced by the journal entries and
one particular resident
found within.
Interests
Floor 1:
Treasure Trove
Hargate's Journal - Page 2
Hargate's Journal - Page 3
Floor 2:
Hargate's Journal - Page 4
Ornate Strongbox
Supreme Chest
Ellena, the First Slith
- Boss creature
Creatures
Arachnid
:
Dreadweave Arachnid
Dreadweave Spitter
Dreadweave Leaper
Dreadweave Widow
Dreadweave Matriarch
Spiderling
Beastkin
:
Deepmire Warrior

:

======================================================================
PAGE: Hidden Laboratory
CATEGORIES: Act 1 Locations, Riftgate Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Hidden_Laboratory
======================================================================

Hidden Laboratory
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
16-30
•
50-65
•
72-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Underground Transit
Ominous Lair
Quests:
None
Hidden Laboratory
is world area in
Act 1
and contains a
Riftgate
. It is accessible from the
Underground Transit
and has two hidden entrances into the
Ominous Lair
.
The area is divided into several sections:
Living Quarters
,
Inner Laboratory
,
Abandoned Storerooms
and finally the
Underground Jail
, which is home to the Act 1 Boss,
The Warden
.
Interests
Untouched meal
Journal of Inquisitor Creed - 5th Entry
Journal of Inquisitor Creed - 6th Entry
Gethrand's Notes - 1st Entry
Gethrand's Notes - 2nd Entry
Gethrand's Notes - Final Entry
Zanbrandt's Notes
Warden's Chest (Boss Room)

======================================================================
PAGE: Hidden Refuge
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Hidden_Refuge
======================================================================

Hidden Refuge
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Temple City of Osyr
Quests:
-
The Hidden Refuge is a secret area in
Act 7
. It is accessed via a hidden path from the
Temple City of Osyr
, north of the Rift Gate on the right hand side, behind some trees.
The area contains no monsters or NPCs.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
- Requires a
Battered Shell
(Normal), or a
Rigid Shell
(Epic & Ultimate).
Urn Cluster - contains
Leovinus' Ring
Unassuming Crate - Required for the
Crate Secret Quest
(Ultimate only).
Hidden Spoils
Rotting Corpse
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Hive Queen's Lair
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Hive_Queen's_Lair
======================================================================

Hive Queen's Lair
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Royal Hive
Quests:
None
The
Hive Queen's Lair
is a small underground area in
Act 3
, accessed via the
Royal Hive
.
The entrance is unlocked initially by collecting pheromone gland quest items from two hero creatures,
Grand Vizier Lozakal
and
Grand Vizier Inixil
. The lair is home to the Boss creature
Swarm Queen Ravna
, target of the
Culling the Swarm
quest.
Interests
Ornate Strongbox
Metal Strongbox
Creatures
Insectoid
:
Dermapteran Weavil
Dermapteran Sentinel
Dermapteran Reaver
Dermapteran Vizier
Dermapteran Progenitor
Infestor
Devouring Swarm
Boss:
Swarm Queen Ravna

Masteries

======================================================================
PAGE: Homestead (Location)
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations, Riftgate Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Homestead_(Location)
======================================================================

Homestead
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-40
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Withering Fields
The Conflagration
Thornsbury Farm
Fallow Fields
Quests:
Many
This page concerns the Location. For the Faction, see
Homestead (Faction)
.
Homestead
is a stronghold of the
Black Legion
and serves as the main town or hub in
Act 3
. The area has a
Riftgate
and connects with the
Withering Fields
,
The Conflagration
,
Thornsbury Farm
and the
Fallow Fields
.
Interests
Notes
Journal of Inquisitor Creed - 7th Entry
Journal of Inquisitor Creed - 8th Entry
Black Legion Scouting Report
Repairs
Homestead has several sections in a state of disrepair; these can be restored over time by completing various quests.
The
Act 2
side quest
Vengeance
adds
Isaiah Reddan
as a merchant if you don't kill him.
Lost Armaments
adds two cannons to the ramparts.
Completing
Culling the Swarm
adds the NPC
Chef Brackham
.
Allies Among the Ashes
restores a building on the west side which then houses the representative from either the
Order of Death's Vigil
or
Kymon's Chosen
.
Lumber for the Legion
repairs a building in the lower west corner and adds bunk beds.
Achieving
Respected
status with either the Order or Kymon's Chosen adds a Faction Quartermaster for that faction to the area by the well. (
Keeper Poruuk
or
Brother Adrius
respectively.)
Quests
The Aetherial Farm

Blood Harvest

Howling Chasm
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
18-75
•
28-90
•
33-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Sunbane Oasis
Basalt Crags
Quests:
-
The Howling Chasm is an underground area in
Act 7
and connects
Sunbane Oasis
to the
Basalt Crags
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Howling Depths
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations

======================================================================

Howling Depths
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
24-75
•
35-90
•
45-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Howling Chasm
Quests:
-
The Howling Depths is a secret underground area in
Act 7
. It accessed via a hidden path behind a breakable wall in the northwest corner of the
Howling Chasm
.
The area has three levels, and is the location for finding the
Third Seal of Morgoneth
.
Interests
Exalted Stash
Notes:
Tuha's Travel Log - Page 1
Tuha's Travel Log - Page 2
Tuha's Letter
Creatures
Eldritch
:
Eldritch Mongrel - Runt

Eldritch Mongrel - Guardian
Eldritch Mongrel - Alpha

Korvan Scarab - Goliath
Boss:
Hallanx  the Forgotten
Gallery
level 1
level 2
level 3

Infernal Wastes
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
25-75
•
30-90
•
35-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Basalt Crags
Valley of the Chosen
Quests:
N/A
The Ruins of Abyd is a world area in
Act 7
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Basalt Crags
and the
Valley of the Chosen
. It also contains the
Eye of Ulzuin
(named for the nearby volcano) and an entrance to the
Tomb of Sethan
.
Interests
Chest: Korvan Secrets
NPCs
These four deserters from Kymon's Chosen are located west of the riftgate.
Brother Narrun
Sister Girra
Brother Ignar
Sister Paulia
Creatures
Moltenclaw - Flayer
Moltenclaw - Nest Guardian
Moltenclaw - Matriarch
Scorpius
Korvan Scorpius - Sandcreeper
Korvan Scorpius - Deathsting

Infested Cellar
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-18
•
48-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Outskirts
Quests:
None
Infested Cellar is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It has two entrances in
Burrwitch Village
.
Interests
Untouched Meal
There is One Breakable wall here
Treasure Trove
(Elite/Ultimate difficulty)

Infested Farms
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-40
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Thornsbury Farm
Elmsworth Farm
Rotting Croplands
Quests:
Hidden Wealth
The
Infested Farms
is a world area in
Act 3
. It connects to
Thornsbury Farm
,
Elmsworth Farm
and the
Rotting Croplands
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal only base game/Ashes expansion - all difficulties with Forgotten Gods expansion)
Notes
:
The Last Will of Marthos Everbrook
- found on a corpse in either of the two houses
Can also spawn in another house in the
Rotting Croplands
Walter's Note
- in the southernmost building.
Journeyman's Pack
Quests
Hidden Wealth
Creatures
Dermapteran Weavil
Dermapteran Sentinel
Dermapteran Reaver
Dermapteran Vizier
Devouring Swarm
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Ivonda’s Hideaway
CATEGORIES: Act 6 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Ivonda’s_Hideaway
======================================================================

Ivonda’s Hideaway
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
66-68
•
76-90
•
88-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Tomb of Herald Mathis
Quests:
-
Ivonda’s Hideaway is a small underground area in
Act 6
, and has a single entrance/exit in the
Tomb of Herald Mathis
.
The area is accessible only as part of the
Mad Ramblings
side quest. It contains no monsters and several treasure chests.

Jagged Waste
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-48
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Pine Barrens
Shaded Basin
Quests:
None
The
Jagged Waste
is an area in
Act 3
. It has an arid, desert-like terrain and is populated mainly by Manticores.
Interests
Journeyman's Pack
Creatures
Beast
:
Manticore Whitemane
Manticore Wastestalker
Manticore Alpha
Boss:
Mogara, the Prime Matriarch

Janaxia's Den
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
70-82
•
85-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Quests:
-
Janaxia's Den
is an underground area in
Act 5
It has a single entrance/exit point in
Ugdenbog
, east of
Coven's Refuge
.

Korvan Plateau
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Conclave of the Three
Temple of Osyr
Korvan Sands
Quests:
-
The Korvan Plateau is a world area in
Act 7
. It has a
Riftgate
and comprises two sections, separated by the
Temple City of Osyr
.
The first section contains the entrance to the
Crawling Nest
.
Interests
Notes:
Korvan Expedition - 1st Entry
Korvan Expedition - 2nd Entry
The Desert Calls
Exalted Stash
NPCs
Master Harken of Death's Vigil
