Korvan Sands
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Korvan Plateau
Cairan Docks
Quests:
The Maw of Enaht
Korvan Sands
is a world area in
Act 7
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Korvan Plateau
and the
Cairan Docks
.
The Korvan Sands contains a secret area, accessed north-east of the Rift gate. Finding it initiates the
The Maw of Enaht
side quest.
Interests
Riftgate
Note:
Carmac's Notes
Sacrificial Altar - requires a
Celestial Essence
to activate, and releases the Super Boss
Callagadra, Scion of the Sands
.
Quests
The Maw of Enaht
Creatures
Beast
:
Korvan Viper

Korvan Viper - Deathvenom
Sandclaw

Boss:
Korvan Titanovore

Act:
2
Monster

18-23

•

Arkovian Foothills

Act 2
and connects to the
Arkovian Foothills
.

Kymon's Sanctuary
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Sorrow's Bastion
Quests:
Many
The Bastion of the Order is an area in
Act 3
and the headquarters of
Kymon's Chosen
. It connects to
Sorrow's Bastion
.

Beacon of Hope
- Note
Acolyte's Pledge
- Note

Larria's Den
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
70-82
•
85-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Quests:
-
Larria's Den
is an underground area in
Act 5
It has a single entrance/exit point in
Ugdenbog
, just north of the Ugdenbog Rift.
NPCs
Larria, the Hexxer
Gallery
Larria's Den location from Ugdenbog rift

Lone Watch
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
64-68
•
74-85
•
85-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Mourndale
Quests:
Malmouth, the Fallen City
Lone Watch
is a world area in
Act 6
It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Mourndale
.
The area is populated by Chthonic Cultists and monsters.
Interests
Notes
:
Loyalty Through Blood
Quests
Malmouth, the Fallen City
NPCs
Ulgrim
Creatures
Human
:
Bloodsworn - Adulant, Bloodsworn Zealot, Bloodsworn Void-Caller
Chthonic
:
Chthonian Harvester, Chthonian Servitor, Chthonian Harvester, Chthonian Bloodkeeper

Lost Oasis
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
21-75
•
31-90
•
36-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Path of the Damned
Tomb of the Heretic
Quests:
-
The
Lost Oasis
is an area with a
Riftgate
in
Act 7
that can be accessed from the
Path of the Damned
and leads to the
Tomb of the Heretic
– one of the rogue-like
Challenge Dungeons
.

Worn Chest

Lost Tomb of the Damned
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
33-60
•
63-70
•
77-100
Riftgate:
None
Adjacent:
Tomb of Archon Barthollem
Quests:
N/A
Lost Tomb of the Damned is an area in
Act 4
. The area can be accessed by activating a Loose Torch, found on a wall on level 2 of the
Tomb of Archon Barthollem
, which opens a secret door.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Elite - requires one
Ancient Heart
and one
Blood of Ch'thon
to restore. (
Guide video
)
Treasure Trove
in the central part of the area
Note
:
A Terrible Discovery
Hidden Spoils
chest behind a breakable wall in the northern-most corner of the map
Creatures
Undead
:
Apparition
Haunted Noble
Haunted Champion
Ghoul
:
Ghoul
Ghoul Corpse-eater
Ghoul Blood-drinker
Ghoul Necrolyte
Boss:
Nacrathan, the Timeless
- Ghoul boss

Lower Crossing
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
1-5
•
1-65
•
1-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Devil's Crossing
Burial Hill
Quests:
Lost Survivor
Lower Crossing
is a world area in
Act 1
, the first the player encounters on leaving
Devil's Crossing
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Devil's Crossing
and
Burial Hill
.
Interests
Detonation Site
- leads to
The Hidden Path
Row Boat - takes the player to
Hargate's Isle
Untouched Meal
Notes
Francis' Note
Harbormaster's Log - Lower Crossing
Journal of Inquisitor Creed - 1st Entry
Journal of Inquisitor Creed - 2nd Entry
Containers
Rotting Corpse x2
Rotting Corpse -
Francis' Note
and
Francis' Gun
Rotting Corpse -
Hevill's Greatsword
Rotting Corpse -
Olman's Axe
Human Remains x1
Journeyman's Pack x2
Uprooted Stump

======================================================================
PAGE: Malmouth Harbor

Malmouth Harbor
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
65-71
•
74-85
•
86-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Steelcap District
Crown Hill
The Blackiron Docks
Quests:
-
The
Malmouth Harbor
is a sub-area in
Act 6
. It is north from the
Steelcap District
and connects to
Crown Hill
to the northeast.
The Blackiron Docks
is an area located in the northwest that's only accessible by quest.
Interests
Blackiron Door - to quest area
The Blackiron Docks
Hidden Stash - located in the south part of the Harbor
Hidden Remains - located in the ruins that connect the south and north
Abandond Weapons - go through building, by overturned armored vehicle
Clear Barricade with 3
Dynamite
Resistance Bomb - on bridge going northeast to
Crown Hill
Cross bridge to Detonation Site to enter Crown Hill
One-shot chests
Ivonda's Chest - inside ruins north end of harbor, take east path
Exalted Stash - north end of Harbor, take east path all the way north
Notes
:
City Guard's Log
- upper floor
To Shatter a City
- inside second building
Nearan's Work Log
- chest in
The Blackiron Docks
Quests
NPCs
Nadia - northwest corner of Harbor
Hyram - southeast section of north harbor
Creatures
Human
:
Ascended - Attendant, Ascended Spellbreaker, Ascended Myrmidion
Aetherial
:
Aether Crystal, Aetherial Crystal Cluster, Aetherial Scamp, Aetherial Imp
Aetherial Corruption
:
Fleshwarped Imp, Tainted Hound, Tainted Pack Leader, Burning Dead
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshweaver, Fleshwarped Abberation
Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Aetherial Guardian, Aetherial Sentinel
Boss:
Fleshweaver Haraxis
- Fleshwarped boss in south part of harbor

Malmouth Outskirts
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
42-70
•
74-85
•
86-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Mourndale
Malmouth Sewers
Burning Cellar
Quests:
-
Malmouth Outskirts
is a world area in
Act 6
. It has a Riftgate and connects to
Mourndale
,
Malmouth Sewers
and the
Candle District
. It also contains two entrances to the
Burning Cellar
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal/Ultimate)
Hidden Path - southwest from the Sewers entrance
NPCs
Gaius Ember - Burning Smith
Creatures
Aetherial
:
Aether Crystal, Aetherial Crystal Cluster, Aetherial Scamp, Aetherial Imp
Ascended - Attendant, Ascended Spellbreaker
Aetherial Corruption
:
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshweaver, Fleshwarped Abberation
Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Aetherial Gutburrower
Undead
:
Haunted Crab, Haunted Spikeshell

======================================================================
PAGE: Malmouth Sewers
CATEGORIES: Act 6 Locations

Malmouth Sewers
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
42-70
•
74-85
•
86-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Malmouth Outskirts
Sewer Hideout
Candle District
Steelcap District
Quests:
-
Malmouth Sewers
is a world area in
Act 6
. It has a Riftgate and is accessed from the
Malmouth Outskirts
. The
Sewer Hideout
is located at the north end of the Sewers. The
Candle District
and
Steelcap District
can be accessed from the Sewer Hideout.
Interests
Hidden Remains - located near the south corner of the large square on the west side of the sewers
Detonation Site
- requires 3
Dynamite
to unblock a hidden area, which contains
Galakros, The Mountain
.
Unfortunate Corpse - located in the north of the hidden area, contains the
Cauldron of Excitement
Epic Helm.
Creatures
Aetherial
:
Aetherial Crystal Cluster, Aetherial Scamp, Aetherial Imp
Ascended - Attendant, Ascended Spellbreaker
Aetherial Corruption
:
Aetherial Bloatworm, Aetherial Iceburrower, Aetherial Rotbellower, Aetherial Blazedrinker, Aetherial Stormdrinker
Tainted Hound, Tainted Pack Leader
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshweaver, Fleshwarped Abberation
Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Architect of Flesh
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Aetherial Stormbearer
Boss:
Galakros, The Mountain
- Aetherial Titan boss

Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Remnants of Korvan City
Quests:
N/A
The
Map Room of Rahn
is an area in
Act 7
It has a hidden and unmarked entrance in the
Remnants of Korvan City
, just south of the Sunward Spire
Shrine
. The camera may need to be rotated to click on it.
The area can only be accessed after completing the
Word of Rahn
quest for the
Cult of Solael
, and is otherwise blocked.
Inside are three Celestial Sarophagus loot chests, guarded by
Bell'oq, Guardian of Rahn
, an Animated Statue Boss. When it is killed, the first Sarcophagus can be opened. Opening a second  Sarcophagus brings a
Map Room Protector
Boss to life. Killing it will unlock the third Sarcophagus which will in turn bring a second Map Room Protector to life.
Interests
Celestial Sarcophagus (x3)
Creatures
Eldritch
:
Eldritch Spirit
Eldritch Spirit - Haunt
Eldritch Spirit - Ancient
Bosses:
Bell'oq, Guardian of Rahn
Map Room Protector

Maw of Enaht
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
24-75
•
35-90
•
45-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Korvan Sands
Quests:
N/A
The
Maw of Enaht
is an underground world area in
Act 7
. It has three levels and a single entrance, found in a secret area east of the
Korvan Sands
Riftgate in an unmarked path in the first alcove to the upper-east; its one-way exit can be seen in the background on the cliff to the west of the Riftgate.
Interests
First Seal of Morgoneth
Fettan Mask
(in one of the urns near the entrance)
Notes:
Carmac's Final Notes
Last Words of Harod - Page 1
Last Words of Harod - Page 2
Last Words of Harod - Page 3

Boss:
Gurblix the Digested

This area is floor 3 of
The Steps of Torment
dungeon in
Act 2
.
The Unique Boss
Grand Priest Zarthuzellan
guards the Gates of Anguish, which need to be unlocked with a
Skeleton Key
in order to access level 4 and 5 (
Suffering
and
Anguish
).

Morgoneth's Folly
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
26-75
•
50-90
•
70-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Court of the Magi
Quests:
-
Morgoneth's Folly
is a world area in
Act 7
. It forms the third and final level of the
Tomb of the Heretic
"Roguelike"
Challenge Dungeon
.
Interests

The Darkness Writhes
Tuha's Report - Page 4

Scion of the Sands

Morton's Claim
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
31-45
•
60-70
•
76-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Blood Grove
The Bone Pit
Quests:
A Stranger in Need
Morton's Claim
is a small side area in
Act 3
located to the far east of the
Blood Grove
Rift. it consists of an old mine working.

Untouched Meal

Mountain Deeps
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
26-45
•
57-70
•
74-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Deadman's Gulch
Prospector's Trail
Quests:
none
The
Mountain Deeps
is an area in
Act 3
and connects to
Deadman's Gulch
and
Prospector's Trail
. The Deadman's Gulch entrance is one-way and cannot be exited from.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
Dahlia Taverin's Corpse can be found in various locations.
Treasure Trove
Note
:
Bozeman's Satchel - contains the
Bozeman's Folly
note
Creatures
Beastkin
:
Trog Blood Drinker
Trog Flesh Ripper
Trog Blood Mage
Arachnid
:
Terrorweave Spiderling
Terrorweave Arachnid
Terrorweave Widow
Terrorweave Matriarch
Insectoid
:
Pale Cavern Crawler
Albino Cavern Crawler
Riftspawn
:
Deepdweller Grub
Boss:
Ikrix, the Ravener

Mourndale
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
63-68
•
74-85
•
85-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Lone Watch
Malmouth Outskirts
Cinder Wastes
Quests:
A Sister's Love
Family Matters
Mourndale
is a world area in
Act 6
, and connects to
Lone Watch
and
Malmouth Outskirts
. A Chthonic rift, with three possible locations, leads to the
Cinder Wastes
.
Interests
Treasure Trove
Notes
:
Missive to the Mourndale Bloodbound
A Calling to Shadows
Aimee Brenoch's Journal - 1st Entry
Quests
A Sister's Love
Family Matters
NPCs
Daila Thornsbury
Creatures
Human
:
Bloodsworn - Adulant, Bloodsworn Zealot, Bloodsworn Void-Caller

Aetherial
:
Aether Crystal, Aetherial Crystal Cluster, Aetherial Scamp, Aetherial Imp, Aetherial Obelisk, Aetherial Terraformer

:
Fleshwarped Imp, Tainted Hound, Tainted Pack Leader, Burning Dead
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshwarped Abberation

:

======================================================================
PAGE: Mud Row

Mud Row
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-18
•
48-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Outskirts
Burrwitch Village
East Marsh
Quests:
None
Mud Row
is a world area in
Act 1
. It is a sub-section of
Burrwitch Outskirts
.
The area features a Bridge Repair Site - repairing the bridge costs 1
Dynamite
, 10
Scrap
and 8000 Iron Bits, and allows access to the
East Marsh
and
Craig's Crags
.
Interests
Untouched Meal
Burrwitch Bridge Repair Site
Creatures
Gallery
Map of Mud Row

Musty Cellar
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-18
•
48-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Estates
Quests:
None
Musty Cellar
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It has entrances in the northern edge of the
Burrwitch Estates
.

PAGE: Necropolis Interior
CATEGORIES: Act 4 Locations, Riftgate Locations

Necropolis Interior
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Gates of Necropolis
Tomb of the Watchers
Bastion of Chaos
Quests:
None
The
Necropolis Interior
is a world area in
Act 4
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Gates of Necropolis
and the
Tomb of the Watchers
, and also contains the entrance to the
Bastion of Chaos
.
Interests
One-Shot Chest
- Exalted Stash with three possible spawn locations
West of the Western Wagon, in the area with the blood circle on the ground
West of the bridge repair site, this is also a possible totem spawn location
Eastern most section of the map, near a path leading to a collasped dead end.
Note:
Commission of the Necropolis - Page 3
Note:
The Blood Flows
Bridge Repair Site
Chthonic Rift
Hidden Spoils, walk through gap in fence directly NE of portal to walk between buildings
Quests
The Bane of Cairn

New Harbor
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
20-25
•
53-65
•
73-100

No
Adjacent:
Four Hills

Quests:

For the Children
New Harbor
is a world area in
Act 2
and connects to
Old Arkovia
and the
Four Hills
.

- opens the way to a secret entrance to
Hanneffy Mine
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Obsidian Throne

Obsidian Throne
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
33-60
•
60-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Forsaken Wastes
Quests:
N/A
The
Obsidian Throne
is an area in
Act 4
. It is a part of the Chthonic Void and is accessed via the
Forsaken Wastes
.
Personal rifts cannot be cast in this area. It has 2 one-way rift portals, one leading back to the Forsaken Wastes, the other, in the center of the map, to the
Plains of Strife
.
Interests
One-Shot Chest
- can spawn in 5 different locations.
Breakable Wall: on the western edge of the map
Creatures
Boss:
Bane'Gargoth
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Old Arkovia
CATEGORIES: Act 2 Locations, Riftgate Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Old_Arkovia
======================================================================

Old Arkovia
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
20-25
•
53-65
•
73-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Arkovian Undercity
Four Hills
New Harbor
Rocky Coast
Twin Falls
Quests:
Many
Old Arkovia
is an area in
Act 2
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Four Hills
,
New Harbor
,
Rocky Coast
, and
Twin Falls
. There are two entrances to the
Arkovian Undercity
: one in the ruins southwest of the Riftgate, and one on the edge of the
Broken Hills
.
Lore
Following a period of steep decline, the rulers of Arkovia needed a scapegoat to distract the disgruntled populace from the corruption threatening to topple the once great empire.
Necromancers
proved to be a perfect target. Already detested by most citizens, the Arkovian Oligarchs banned the practice of necromancy outright and condemned its practitioners to the prison known as the
Steps of Torment
. One of the last necromancers to be captured was the mysterious
Uroboruuk
. But he was unlike any other, for he could not be killed by any means employed by the Arkovian executioners.
This naturally intrigued the Oligarchs, who craved such power for themselves. After excruciating and lengthy torture, Uroboruuk eventually gave in to their wishes and performed a ritual that would bestow his secret upon the greedy rulers. With the spell unleashed, the necromancer slipped away while the Arkovians tested their newfound immortality.
However, there was more to the spell than Uroboruuk let on, something the Arkovians discovered all too late. Their immortality was not a blessing, but a curse. Their wounds would not heal. The elderly would rot away from disease. Over decades of tormented existence without the merciful release of death, the Arkovians were driven mad, forever trapped between life and death. Nothing remained of them but spirits and bones. Uroboruuk’s revenge was absolute.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal Only)
Detonation Site
Untouched Meal
Journeyman's Pack
Ancient Lectern
Player Graves - Three gravestones which each spawn a skeleton, named after supporters of the GD Kickstarter campaign.

Old Grove
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
35-50
•
40-74
•
50-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Devil's Crossing
Quests:
N/A
The Old Grove is a small world area in
Act 1
. It connects to
Devil's Crossing
and is accessed by repairing the southern bridge.
The area has no monsters, and features a single loot chest
Interests
Scrap Pile: contains the
Totally Normal Arbiter
and/or
Totally Normal Guardian
items (99% and 1% chance to drop respectively).

The Ominous Lair
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
16-30
•
50-65
•
72-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Abandoned Storerooms
Hidden Laboratory
Quests:
None
The
Ominous Lair
is a
secret
world area accessed via the
Abandoned Storerooms
section of the
Hidden Laboratory
.

======================================================================

Overgrown Cellar
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
36-62
•
65-80
•
71-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Gloomwald
Quests:
n/a
The
Overgrown Cellar
is an underground area in
Act 5
. It has a single entrance in
Gloomwald
, just west of the Gloomwald Crossing Rift.
Avris Marrowill can usually be found here or sometimes in the
Decrepit Cellar
.
Interests
...

Ugdenbog Spikeshell

Ugdenbog Cannibal - Bloodsinger
Boss
Avris Marrowill
- Ugdenbog cannibal that summons Ancient Wraiths

Path of the Damned
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
21-75
•
31-90
•
36-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Valley of the Chosen
Lost Oasis
Quests:
Paying Debts
The Path of the Damned is an underground area in
Act 7
that can be accessed in the
Valley of the Chosen
after obtaining all three Seals of Morgoneth (Seals can be obtained with or without the quest
Paying Debts
)
This small tomb section leads to the
Lost Oasis
.
Interests
Glamorous Chest (x2)
Worn Chest

======================================================================
PAGE: Pine Barrens
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations, Riftgate Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Pine_Barrens
======================================================================

Pine Barrens
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-48
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Prospector's Trail
Jagged Waste
Quests:
many
The
Pine Barrens
is an area in
Act 3
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Prospector's Trail
and the
Jagged Waste
.
The area has a small
Black Legion
camp near the riftgate.
Interests
Untouched Meal
Note:
Dangerous Roads
Quests
Manticore Venom
Ol' Bloodbriar
Pride of the Jagged Waste
The Gloomweaver
The Groble Tyrant
NPCs
Deathmark Kadris
Deathmark Vallar
Deathmark Harra
Creatures
Aether Corruption
:
Corruption

PAGE: Plains of Strife

Plains of Strife
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
34-60
•
64-70
•
78-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Fort Ikon
Gates of Necropolis
Quests:
None
The
Plains of Strife
is a world area in
Act 4
. It connects to
Fort Ikon
and the
Gates of Necropolis
. The area also contains a Chthonic Rift that leads to
The Forsaken Wastes
, with 3 spawn locations.
The ground in this area is covered in Flare Mines, which can damage both the player and enemies.
Lore- the name of the area most likely refers to the ongoing battle between the Black Legion and the Aetherials in the area. The region has become pockmarked by the many engagements between the 2 forces, leaving numerous areas covered in Aetherfire and small craters, likely due to cannonfire from the many cannons in the area. The Black Legion has set up numerous roadblocks made out of both barbed wire and timber rails, however much of the area has been overrun by Aetherials, although some Black Legion Squads can be found fending off the aetherials.
Interests
Chthonic Rift

======================================================================
PAGE: Port Valbury
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Port_Valbury
======================================================================

Port Valbury
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
55-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Conflagration
Quests:
n/a
Port Valbury
is a world area in
Act 3
, accessed via an Aetherial rift in
The Conflagration
. You would need dynamite to blow up the Aether crystals blocking the way to the Aetherial rift. It consists of a large urban area overrun with Aetherials.
The area forms one of Grim Dawn's sealed "Roguelike"
Challenge Dungeons
. A crafted
Skeleton Key
is required to continue beyond the first area and the player cannot use a riftgate to exit; the only way out is via death or completing all levels.
Port Valbury is divided into four distinct zones:
Port Valbury Outskirts
Port Valbury: Foundation
Port Valbury: Old Town
Port Valbury: High Town
- also includes the
Throne of Van Aldritch
boss room and
Aldritch's Private Quarters
.
Lore
A once proud and prosperous city with a booming port and trade network, Port Valbury has suffered greatly under the influence of the Aetherials. Even before the Grim Dawn was fully unleashed upon Cairn, their agents had begun working on undermining the population and throwing the city into chaos.
The city’s mayor, Khallos Strune, could not have suspected the schemes happening right under his nose, and when he began to realize that one of his advisors,
Councilor Van Aldritch
, was not using his position to the best interest of the citizenry, it was already too late. Port Valbury, as were countless other settlements across the Erulan Empire, was doomed.

======================================================================
PAGE: Port Valbury Outskirts
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Port_Valbury_Outskirts

Port Valbury Outskirts
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
55-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Conflagration
Port Valbury: Foundation
Quests:
none
Port Valbury Outskirts is a world area in
Act 3
, and forms the initial stage of the
Port Valbury
Challenge Dungeon
.
The area is accessed via a rift located in
The Conflagration
. It is inhabited solely by
Aetherials
and
Aether Corruptions
, and has a +2/3/3 creature level offset.
Interests
Note:
The City is Rotting
- drops from the
Herald of the Stars
One-Shot Chest
Creatures
Boss:
Herald of the Stars
Gallery

Port Valbury:Foundation
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
55-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Port Valbury Outskirts
Port Valbury: Old Town
Quests:
none
Port Valbury: Foundation is a world area in
Act 3
, and forms the second level of the
Port Valbury
Challenge Dungeon
.
The area has a +4/5/5 creature level offset.
Interests
A breakable wall in the north-western corner of the brick area.

======================================================================
PAGE: Port Valbury: High Town
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Port_Valbury:_High_Town
======================================================================

Port Valbury: High Town
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
55-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Port Valbury: Old Town
Quests:
none
Port Valbury: High Town is a world area in
Act 3
, and forms the fourth and final level of the
Port Valbury
Challenge Dungeon
. Underneath Port Valbury, after you kill Overlord Van Aldritch you can find small location:
Aldritch's Private Quarters
. You can find Katrine over there, who is worry about her daughter Alice.
The area has a +5/6/6 creature level offset.

The Same Dream Again

A Change of Plans

Port Valbury: Old Town
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
55-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Port Valbury: Foundation
Port Valbury: High Town
Quests:
none
Port Valbury: Old Town is a world area in
Act 3
, and forms the third level of the
Port Valbury
Challenge Dungeon
.
The area has a +4/5/5 creature level offset.

Prison Dungeons
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
7-14
•
9-68
•
11-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Convict's Tunnel
Devil's Aquifer
Quests:
None
Prison Dungeons
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It connects to
Convict's Tunnel
and
Devil's Aquifer
.

PAGE: Prospector's Trail

Prospector's Trail
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-40
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Mountain Deeps
Withering Fields
Pine Barrens
Quests:
None
Prospector's Trail
is an area in
Act 3
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Mountain Deeps
,
Withering Fields
and the
Pine Barrens
.
A
Detonation Site
must be cleared in order to access the Pine Barrens.
Interests
Riftgate
Detonation Site
Creatures
Grobles - Stone Clan
Grobles - Ember Clan
Aether Corruptions
Briarthorn Horror
Briarthorn Terror

======================================================================
PAGE: Putrid Den

Putrid Den
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
5-9
•
45-60
•
70-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Old Dump
Quests:
None
The
Putrid Den
is a small underground world area in
Act 1
. The entrance is unmarked on the map and can spawn in three different locations, each around the
Old Dump
area.
Beware the toxic water!
Interests
Creatures
Beast
:
Boneback
Rabid Boneback

Pusquill the Hoarder

Ransacked Lighthouse
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
65-69
•
74-85
•
86-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Steelcap District
Malmouth Harbor
Quests:
-
The
Ransacked Lighthouse
is a dungeon in
Act 6
. It is accessed by the Fort Entrance in the
Steelcap District
just before entering the Malmouth Harbor. Exiting the Ransacked Lighthouse by the north door puts you north of the Steel District door just inside the
Malmouth Harbor
.
Interests
Dynamite
- northwest corner
Hidden Spoils - go to the center area and take a wooden bridge to the south
Creatures
Aetherial Corruption
:
Fleshwarped Imp, Tainted Hound, Tainted Pack Leader
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshweaver, Fleshwarped Abberation
Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Aetherial Bloatworm, Aetherial Iceburrower, Aetherial Rotbellower, Aetherial Blazedrinker, Aetherial Stormdrinker
Boss:
Fleshshaper Hinissius
- Fleshwarped boss

======================================================================
PAGE: Remnants of Korvan City

Remnants of Korvan City
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
22-75
•
33-90
•
40-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Valley of the Chosen
Quests:
The Forgotten God
A Mother's Gift
The Remnants of Korvan City is a world area in
Act 7
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Valley of the Chosen
,
Pit of Atonement
and the
Tomb of the Eldritch Sun
.
There are two small sub-areas, the
Sunward Spire
to the north and the
Path of Ascension
in the north-west. The area also contains the entrance to the
Map Room of Rahn
.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
Treasure Trove
Notes:
Korvan Expedition - 4th Entry
Korvan Expedition - Final Entry
Missing Shipments
Security Concerns
Writings of Rion the Scholar - 2nd Entry
Writings of Rion the Scholar - 3rd Entry
Writings of Rion the Scholar - 4th Entry
Writings of Rion the Scholar - 5th Entry

River Passage
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
16-30
•
50-65
•
72-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Village
Hallowed Hill
Quests:
None
River Passage
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It can be accessed by an unmarked entrance in
Burrwitch Village
and leads to
Hallowed Hill
.
Interests
Slith Altar
Creatures
Deepmire Warrior
Deepmire Vanguard
Deepmire Champion
Deepmire Shaman

Scavenger Alpha

======================================================================
PAGE: Rocky Coast
CATEGORIES: Act 2 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Rocky_Coast
======================================================================

Rocky Coast
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
20-25
•
53-65
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Arkovian Foothills
Old Arkovia
Stirring Hive
Quests:
None
The
Rocky Coast
is an area in
Act 2
and connects to the
Arkovian Foothills
and
Old Arkovia
. From the Old Arkovia rift gate, head south.
The area also contains the entrance to the
Stirring Hive
.
The area is accessed after destroying a blockade by means of the
Detonation Site
in the
Arkovian Foothills
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal/Elite)
Creatures
Beast
:
Stonetusk
Gargantuan Stonetusk
Ironhide Stonetusk
Human
:
Cronley's Gang - Lackey
Cronley's Gang - Gunman
Cronley's Gang - Arsonist
Cronley's Gang - Brute
Insectoid
:
Venomwing Drone
Venomwing Stinger
Venomwing Queen

======================================================================
PAGE: Rotting Croplands

======================================================================

Rotting Croplands
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-40
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Infested Farms
The Gruesome Harvest
Buried Crypt
Quests:
The
Rotting Croplands
is a world area in
Act 3
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Infested Farms
,
The Gruesome Harvest
,
Buried Crypt
and the
Royal Hive
.
South of the Riftgate there is a small Rover camp with several minor NPCs.
Interests
Elara's Journal
- note located at the Rover camp.
Detonation Site
- uncovers the entrance to the
Buried Crypt
.
Wald's Note
- found on a Rotting Corpse in the south-western corner of the area.
Quests
Hidden Wealth
NPCs
Elara
Kaldara
Tarvic
Umkalo
Creatures
Aether Corruption
:
Walking Dead
Rotting Soldier
Fleshwarped Butcher

Royal Hive
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Rotting Croplands
Quests:
None
The
Royal Hive
is an underground area in
Act 3
. The entrance spawns randomly and unmarked in the northern part of the
Rotting Croplands
.
Royal Hive is densely populated with
Dermapterans
and has several side-areas: the
Hive Queen's Lair
,
Swarming Hatchery
,
Skittering Den
and the
Den of the Lost
.
Interests
One-Shot Chest
- can spawn in several of the sub-areas.
Hive Queen's Lair
A
Shrine
in the
Den of the Lost
Creatures
Insectoid
:
Dermapteran Weavil
Dermapteran Sentinel
Dermapteran Reaver
Dermapteran Vizier
Dermapteran Progenitor
Infestor
Devouring Swarm
Heroes:
Grand Vizier Lozakal
Grand Vizier Inixil
Gallery
8 possible entrances
Masteries

Ruins of Abyd
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
18-75
•
28-90
•
33-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Vanguard of the Three
Infernal Wastes
Quests:
N/A
The Ruins of Abyd is a world area in
Act 7
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Vanguard of the Three
and the
Infernal Wastes
. It also contains the
Burning Spire
and the entrance to the
Temple of Ateph
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
Exalted Stash
One-Shot Chest
Hidden Spoils
Note:
Missive to Elders of Ulzuin's Temple

Sanctuary of Horran
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
16-75
•
26-90
•
32-120
Riftgate:
no
Adjacent:
Sunbane Oasis
Quests:
n/a
The Sanctuary of Horran is an underground area in
Act 7
. It has a single entrance in the
Sunbane Oasis
.
The area is the location for the target of the
Dreeg's Usurper
quest.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
Korvan Secrets
Hidden Remains
The Trials of Horran
(Note)
Creatures
Boss:
Navan, the Usurper
Gallery

Sanctum of Flesh
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
48-75
•
80-90
•
92-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Fleshworks
Quests:
Sanctum of Flesh
is an underground lair of The Master of Flesh - Theodin Marcell in
Act 6
. It connects to the
Fleshworks
.
Interests
Aetherial Rift to
Crown Hill
The Master's Collection -
One-Shot Chest
The Master's Trove x2
Notes:
Missive to the Master of Flesh
- drop from
The Master of Flesh - Theodin Marcell
Creatures
Aetherial Corruption
:
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshweaver, Fleshwarped Abberation
Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Architect of Flesh
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Aetherial Stormbearer
Boss:
The Master of Flesh - Theodin Marcell

Sanctum of the Chosen
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
n/a
•
n/a
•
80-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Malmouth Outskirts
Edge of Reality
Quests:
None
The Sanctum of the Chosen is a small secret area only accessible on Ultimate Difficulty.
Entrance is gained as part of
Lokarr's Secret Quest
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(requires a
Skeleton Key
)
Note
:
You Are Not Welcome!
Stone Door - directly behind the Shrine, leading to the
Edge of Reality
Gallery

Sanctum of the Immortal
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Gates of Necropolis
Edge of Reality (Act 4)
Quests:
None
The Sanctum of the Immortal is a small secret area only accessible on Ultimate Difficulty.
Entrance is gained as part of the secret
quest
relating to
Daila Thornsbury
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Ultimate only)
Note
:
Dravis' Letter to Daila - Final Entry
Loose Torch - opens a Chthonic Rift to the
Edge of Reality
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Sandblown Ruins
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations

Sandblown Ruins
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
16-75
•
26-90
•
32-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Cairan Docks
Quests:
-
Sandblown Ruins are an underground area in
Act 7
. It has two levels, with a single entrance in the
Cairan Docks
.
The Ruins are the location for the
Tomb Brothers
side quest.
Interests
Exalted Stash - One-Shot Chest
Dynamite
Desecrated Shrine
Creatures
Tirgan, the Mad Priest

Seal of the Loghorrean
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Tomb of the Watchers
Edge of Madness
Quests:
None
The
Seal of the Loghorrean
is a world area in
Act 4
, and connects to the
Tomb of the Watchers
and the
Edge of Madness
.
This area comprises the second level of the final three-level dungeon.
Interests
Note:
Secret Work
Note:
Sealed In
Untouched Meal

Bloodsworn Adulant

Chthonian Tyrant
Boss:
Bloodlord Thalonis

======================================================================
PAGE: Secret Areas
CATEGORIES: Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Secret_Areas
======================================================================

Secret
Areas encompass locations with entrances that are concealed or unmarked. Entrances may have multiple spawn points.
Act 1
Cultist's Lair
Depraved Sanctuary
Hallowed Hill
Ominous Lair
Putrid Den
Smuggler's Basin
Sunken Reliquary
Act 3
Benevald - Strange Wares
The Bone Pit
Bloodbriar's Lair
Buried Crypt
Den of the Lost
Shrine of the Forgotten God
Act 4
Lost Tomb of the Damned
Sanctum of the Immortal
Edge of Reality
Act 6
Edge of Reality
In addition, many normal areas, particularly undergrounds, also have secret rooms and passages that can be accessed through breakable walls. These rooms can contain extra loot or monsters. Such areas are listed below and details can be found on the area's individual page.
Infested Cellar
Musty Cellar
Dank Cellar
The Warden's Cellar
Underground Transit
Arkovian Undercity
Hanneffy Mine
Cronley's Hideout
Steps of Torment
Tyrant's Hold
Darkvale Gate
Fort Ikon
Fort Ikon Armory
Bastion of Chaos

Sewer Hideout
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
42-70
•
74-85
•
86-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Malmouth Sewers
Candle District
Steelcap District
Quests:
Bring Out Your Dead
For the People
Someone on the Inside
The
Sewer Hideout
is sub-area in
Act 6
. It is located in the
Malmouth Sewers
north from the Riftgate. This is the initial homebase of the
Malmouth Resistance
.
Interests
The Malmouth Bounty Table

-
Journal of Inquisitor Creed - 10th Entry

Shaded Basin
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-48
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Jagged Waste
Tyrant's Hold
Bloodbriar's Lair
Forgotten Depths
Quests:
None
The
Shaded Basin
is an area in
Act 3
and connects to the
Jagged Waste
and
Tyrant's Hold
, as well as the
Bloodbriar's Lair
and the
Forgotten Depths
underground areas.

Untouched Meal

Shrine of Azaleon
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
N/A
Adjacent:
Sunbane Oasis
Quests:
N/A
The
Shrine of Azaleon
is a small secret area in
Act 7
, south of the Sunbane Oasis. It can be accessed by  a  finding a secret path east of the
Sunbane Oasis
Riftgate (turn down/south where the Bysmiel Sect NPCs are).
Interests
Rotting Corpse
Ornate Strongbox
NPCs
Egellon - Forgotten Smith

no
Adjacent:
Conclave of the Three
Quests:
N/A
The Shrine of Horran is a secret area in
Act 7
overlooking the
Conclave of the Three
. It is accessed via a secret path found immediately south of the Conclave Riftgate, concealed by some trees. The area contains a statue and some loot containers.
Interests
Hidden Spoils
Urn Cluster - contains the
Totally Normal Shield
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Shrine of the Forgotten God
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations, Secret Areas
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Shrine_of_the_Forgotten_God
======================================================================

Shrine of the
Forgotten God
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
31-45
•
60-70
•
76-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Gryver's Mill
Quests:
None
The
Shrine of the Forgotten God
is a
secret area
in
Act 3
It can be accessed from the bottom corner of
Gryver's Mill
; there is a small waterfall which can be passed under to reach the Shrine.
The Forgotten God in question is
Korvaak
, whose image is depicted on the shrine.
The area is inhabited by a few
manticores
.
Interests
Ancient Sarcophagus
Note:
Scribe Osteram's Notes
Breakable urn cluster:
Totally Normal Bulwark
(Forgotten Gods only)
Creatures
Manticore Blackmane
Manticore Nightstalker
Manticore Alpha

======================================================================
PAGE: Skittering Den
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Skittering_Den
======================================================================

Skittering Den
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Royal Hive
Den of the Lost
Quests:
None
The
Skittering Den
is a small underground area in
Act 3
. It is accessed via the
Royal Hive
.
The area has a secret room behind a breakable wall which contains the entrance to the
Den of the Lost
- a secret area with a
Desecrated Shrine
and the location of the Unique Boss Creature
Gollus, the Deepdweller
, who has a chance to drop
Gollus' Ring
.
Interests
Possible spawn location for the Swarming Hive
One-Shot Chest
.
Creatures
Insectoid
:
Hive Guard Anoxis, the Tainted
Dermapteran Weavil
Dermapteran Sentinel
Dermapteran Reaver
Dermapteran Vizier
Dermapteran Progenitor
Infestor
Devouring Swarm

======================================================================
PAGE: Smuggler's Basin

Smuggler's Basin
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
18-40
•
55-65
•
74-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Outskirts
Quests:
None
"A presence far more powerful than you dwells in this place..."
Smuggler's Basin
is a semi-secret underground area in
Act 1
. The entrance is unmarked and may spawn in any of three locations around the
Burrwitch Outskirts
and
Mud Row
.
The area contains one monster, a Boss:
Gutworm, the Maneater
.
Interests
Supreme Chest
Gallery
Smuggler's Basin Entrance Locations

Smuggler's Pass
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
25-40
•
56-68
•
74-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Barren Highlands
Deadman's Gulch
Quests:
None
Smuggler's Pass
is an underground area in
Act 2
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Barren Highlands
and
Deadman's Gulch
.
Interests
Scrap Piles with a chance to drop
Dynamite
Creatures
Aether Corruption
:
Reanimator
Walking Dead
Wretcher
Fury
Cold One
Burning Dead
Plague Walker
Rotting Soldier
Rotting Emberguard
Fleshwarped Butcher
Fleshwarped Thrasher
Fleshwarped Troll
Beastkin
:
Mistborn Elder
Mistborn Hunter
Mistborn Shaman
Mistborn Warrior
Mistborn Brute
Stonewart Troll
Stonewart Rager
Stonewart Behemoth
Boss:
Voldrak, the Destroyer
Gallery

Sorrow's Bastion
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
30-43
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Fallow Fields
The Blood Grove
Kymon's Sanctuary
Bastion of the Order
Quests:
None
Sorrow's Bastion
is a small area in
Act 3
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Fallow Fields
and
The Blood Grove
.
The area consists of a ruined fortification which holds the headquarters for
Kymon's Chosen
and the
Order of Death's Vigil
factions.
Interests
Riftgate
Kymon's Sanctuary
Bastion of the Order
NPCs
Renall Oberach
(Legion scout)
Kymon's Chosen - Zealot
Kymon's Chosen - Stormbearer
Death's Vigil - Neophyte

Spined Cove
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
19-23
•
52-65
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Arkovian Foothills
Quests:
None
The
Spined Cove
is an underground world area in
Act 2
.  The area has two entrances/exits located in the
Arkovian Foothills
, east of the Riftgate.

(Normal/Elite)

Staunton Mine
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
18-23
•
52-65
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Arkovian Foothills
Quests:
None
Staunton Mine
is an underground area in
Act 2
.  The area has two entrances/exits located west of the
Arkovian Foothills
Rift gate.

Steelcap District
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
44-72
•
77-86
•
88-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Sewer Hideout
Candle District
Malmouth Harbor
Tomb of Herald Mathis
Ransacked Lighthouse
Swelling Depths
Quests:
Arming the Resistance
Can't Leave Them
Mad Ramblings
Survivors
Rictor's Thanks
The
Steelcap District
is a world area in
Act 6
. It has a Riftgate and connects to the Malmouth Resistance
Sewer Hideout
,
Malmouth Harbor
,
Candle District
and
Tomb of Herald Mathis
.
Interests
Notes
:
Chthonic Heresy Page 1 - Drops from Disallus
Chthonic Heresy Page 2 - first floor of first ruined building
Chthonic Heresy Page 3 - random drop from Cultists
Note to Aimee Brenoch
- inside first ruined house on second floor
Criminal Records - Page 1
Arcane Supplies

Stirring Hive
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
20-32
•
53-70
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Rocky Coast
Quests:
None
The
Stirring Hive
is a small underground area in
Act 2
. It connects to the
Rocky Coast
. From the Old Arkovia rift gate, head south.
Interests
Creatures
Insectoid
:
Venomwing Drone
Venomwing Stinger
Venomwing Queen
Boss:
Ronaprax, the Grand Queen

======================================================================
PAGE: Stonerend Quarry

Stonerend Quarry
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
31-45
•
60-70
•
76-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Blood Grove
Quests:
A Catalyst
Stonerend Quarry
is a small side-area in
Act 3
. It can be found to the north-east of the
Blood Grove
riftgate.
The area is overrun with Aetherfire and
Aether Corruption
creatures, and is used in several
Faction
bounties.
Creatures
Boss:
Venarius, the Backbreaker

PAGE: Suffering

======================================================================

Suffering
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
26-50
•
45-78
•
70-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Misery
Anguish
Quests:
None
This area is floor 4 of
The Steps of Torment
dungeon in
Act 2
. Personal rifts cannot be opened on this level.
Suffering contains the
Chamber of Souls
(also known as the Death Room). On entering, the player is sealed in the room and must defeat 3 waves of monsters before the Bone Reliquary can be opened and the room unsealed.
Another sealed room at the top of the map holds the unique boss
Ilgorr, the Eternal
.
Interests
Breakable wall
Ornate Strongbox
Chamber of Souls
Bone Reliquary - drops a guaranteed Epic item.
The Totally Normal Buckler (FG)
Creatures
Undead
:
Apparition
Haunted Noble
Haunted Champion
Skeletal Warrior
Skeletal Archer
Skeletal Deathbolt Archer
Skeletal Knight
Skeletal Priest
Skeletal Warlock
Flame Revenant
Frost Revenant
Storm Revenant
Death Revenant
Skeletal Gargantuan
Skeletal Monstrosity
Boss:
Ilgorr, the Eternal
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Sunbane Oasis
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations

Sunbane Oasis
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Cairan Docks
Howling Chasm
Quests:
N/A
Sunbane Oasis
is an area in
Act 7
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Cairan Docks
and the
Howling Chasm
. It also has entrances to
Durg's Den
and the
Sanctuary of Horran
underground areas.
There is a secret path underneath the broken bridge which leads to a large area with a Royal Sarcophagus.
Just east of the riftgate is another secret path leading to the
Shrine of Azaleon
.
Interests
Canen's Corpse - Drops the
Tome of Eanatum
quest item
Royal Sarcophagus
Hidden Remains
Notes:
Naiema's Letter to Yorhun
- inside a dilapidated Urn, west of the Riftgate.
The Burning Shores
- in an Urn on the west side of the broken bridge.
Creatures
Beast
:
Gryphon
Gryphon Sandstalker
Gryphon Matriarch
Korvan Viper
Korvan Viper - Sandstalker
Korvan Viper - Deathvenom
Sandclaw
Sandclaw - Flayer
Sandclaw - Nest Guardian
Sandclaw - Matriarch
Insectoid
:
Korvan Scorpius
Korvan Scorpius - Sandcreeper
Korvan Scorpius - Deathsting
Boss:
Gannar'vakkar, King of the Sands

Sunken Reliquary
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
25-48
•
55-70
•
74-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
The Flooded Passage
Quests:
None
The
Sunken Reliquary
is a
secret
world area in
Act 1
and connects to
The Flooded Passage
.
Although located in Act 1, it is necessary to have completed at least some of Act 2 to enter, as access is gained by placing 3
Dynamite
in the
Detonation Site
to unblock the entrance.
Interests
Ornate Strongbox
One-Shot Chest
Writings of Rolderathis - 1st Entry
Writings of Rolderathis - 2nd Entry

High Priest Rolderathis

Sunward Spire
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
22-75
•
33-90
•
40-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Remnants of Korvan City
Quests:
N/A
The Sunward Spire is a side area in
Act 7
and adjoins the
Remnants of Korvan City
.
It consists of an initial small arena, behind which is a path leading to a ruined tower with three interior levels.
Interests
Shrine
outside the dungeon
Notes:
I Stand Before the Eldritch Sun

Swarming Hatchery
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Royal Hive
Quests:
None
The
Swarming Hatchery
is a small underground area in
Act 3
, accessed via the
Royal Hive
.
Interests
The Hatchery is a possible spawn location for the Swarming Hive
One-Shot Chest
.
Creatures
Insectoid
:
Dermapteran Weavil
Dermapteran Sentinel

Swarming Hive
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
22-45
•
54-70
•
73-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Twin Falls
Quests:
None
The
Swarming Hive
is a small underground area in
Act 2
. It connects to
Twin Falls
.
Interests
One-Shot Chest
Royal Jelly
Creatures
Venomwing Drone
Venomwing Stinger
Venomwing Queen
Boss:
Ulraprax, the Hive Matriarch

======================================================================
PAGE: Swelling Depths
CATEGORIES: Act 6 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Swelling_Depths
======================================================================

Swelling Depths
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
44-72
•
77-86
•
88-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Steelcap District
Quests:
N/A
Swelling Depths
is a side area in
Act 6
, accessed via a passage in the
Steelcap District
of
Malmouth
. It is one several side areas added in the
1.1.8.0
update.
The area is a
Treacherous Domain
, and will have one or two random
Mutators
active.
Interests
Hidden body at the end of an "off-map" passage, a few steps to the right of the exit.
Bosss:
Blugrug, the Living Plague
Map

======================================================================
PAGE: Tainted Wood
CATEGORIES: Act 5 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Tainted_Wood
======================================================================

Tainted Wood
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
50-75
•
70-85
•
95-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Feral Thicket
Ugdenbog
Quests:
n/a
The
Tainted Wood
is an
Act 5
world area, and part of the
Ancient Grove
Challenge Dungeon
. The area has a +5/6/6 monster level offset.
There is a hidden path along the east side of the area. The south end starts by going through a crumbling tower. There are two
Fleshwarped Hidden Spoils
and a
One-Shot Chest
located by an Aetherial Obselisk.
The northwest area is named the
Heart of the Forest
, the final Boss room for
Gargabol, Heart of the Wild
, who must be defeated to complete the
Cleanse the Corruption
quest.
To the northwest in the Heart of the Forest is a Monolith that provides a shortcut back to
Ugdenbog
outside the entrance to the
Ancient Grove
.
Interests
One-Shot Chest
in the secret area on the east side
Transcendent Chest
Glorious Chest x2
Note:
Mogdrogen's Ruminations
Creatures
Boss:
Gargabol, Heart of the Wild
(Plant Eldritch Boss)
Vilgazor
(beast boss)

======================================================================
PAGE: Temple City of Osyr
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations

======================================================================

Temple City of Osyr
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Korvan Plateau
Temple of Osyr
Quests:
-
The Temple City of Osyr is a world area in
Act 7
. It has a
Riftgate
and lies in the middle of the
Korvan Plateau
. It also has a single entrance to the
Temple City of Osyr
, and contains a secret path to the
Hidden Refuge
.
Interests
Note:
The Sting
NPCs
Kait
Elita
Creatures
Eldritch
:
Eldritch Spirit
Eldritch Spirit - Haunt
Eldritch Spirit - Ancient
Undead
:
Mummy - Desiccated
Mummy - Festering
Mummy - Rotter
Mummy - Scorcher

======================================================================
PAGE: Temple of Ateph
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations

======================================================================

Temple of Ateph
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
20-75
•
31-90
•
36-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Ruins of Abyd
Quests:
N/A
The Temple of Ateph is an underground area in
Act 7
with two levels. It has single entrance in the
Ruins of Abyd
.
Interests
Hidden Spoils
Bloodsworn Corpse
Altar of Ateph - used during the
Byscilla's Plan
quest.
Quests
Fate of the Bloodsworn
Creatures
The second level of the Temple contains different bosses depending on the outcome of the
The Bloodsworn Damned
quest.
If the quest was never completed, or was completed by leaving the Bloodsworn to die:
Risen Stone, Temple Guardian
Inashkor, Temple Guardian
If the quest was completed by helping the Bloodsworn escape:
Ketan'Thunn
Gallery

======================================================================
PAGE: Temple of Osyr
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Temple_of_Osyr
======================================================================

Temple of Osyr
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
16-75
•
26-90
•
32-120
Riftgate:
N/A
Adjacent:
Temple City of Osyr
Quests:
N/A
The
Temple of Osyr
is an underground area in
Act 7
. It has two levels, with a single entrance in the
Temple City of Osyr
.
The Temple is a target area for the
Eldritch Corruption
and
Blood of the Korvan Guardians
quests, and the resident Boss Creature,
Ramzul, High Priest of Osyr
is the target for the
Eye of Ekur
quest.
Interests
Treasure Trove
Desecrated Shrine
Royal Sarcophagus
Note:
My Hands Are Not My Own
Creatures
Eldritch
:
Animated Keeper
Animated Watcher
Animated Preserver
Possessed Armor
Eldritch Armor
Ancient Armor
Eldritch Spirit
Eldritch Spirit - Haunt
Eldritch Spirit - Ancient
Undead
:
Mummy - Desiccated
Mummy - Festering
Mummy - Rotter
Mummy - Scorcher
Boss:
Ramzul, High Priest of Osyr

======================================================================
PAGE: Temple of the Three

Temple of the Three
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
35-60
•
60-70
•
74-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
East Marsh
Quests:
n/a
The
Temple of the Three
is a world area in
Act 1
. The dungeon entrance is located in a secret area off the
East Marsh
, and access is unlocked during the
Hidden Path
side quest.
Interests
Ramblings of Ughdar
- Note
The Runes Fall Silent
- Note
Breakable Wall - Second of the four submerged rooms on the north side of map
Breakable Wall - West of the first green seal before the boss room
Breakable Wall - South side of room with the second green seal right before the boss room
Breakable Wall - South of the Attendant in the final room
NPCs
The Attendant
Creatures
Boss:
The Sentinel
Arachnid:
Eldritch Arachnid
Eldritch Weaver
Eldritch Matriarch
Eldritch Crawler
Beast:

Riftspawn:

Eldritch Alpha
Eldritch Stormchaser

Elditch Lifedrinker
Eldritch Swarmer
Nightmare Crawler

The Black Sepulcher
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Gates of Necropolis
Quests:
None
The Black Sepulcher
is a world area in
Act 4
. It has one entrance located in the
Gates of Necropolis
.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Hidden Chest behind breakable wall, east side of Plagius boss room.
Creatures
Ghoul
:

The Blood Grove
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
31-45
•
60-70
•
76-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Sorrow's Bastion
Morton's Claim
Fort Haron
Ashen Waste
Gryver's Mill
Quests:
Burn the Taken
The Blood Grove
is a world area in
Act 3
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Sorrow's Bastion
,
Morton's Claim
,
Fort Haron
,
Ashen Waste
and
Gryver's Mill
.

(Normal only)

======================================================================
PAGE: The Bone Pit
CATEGORIES: Act 3 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/The_Bone_Pit
======================================================================

The Bone Pit
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
31-45
•
60-70
•
76-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Morton's Claim
Quests:
none
The Bone Pit
is a small underground area in
Act 3
and connects to
Morton's Claim
. The entrance can be unblocked during the
A Stranger in Need
side quest. It is located in the far east section of The Blood Grove.
The Pit is inhabited by a single Unique Boss Creature, the
Wraith of Sorrows
.
Gallery
Map of The Bone Pit

The Burial Cave
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
12-18
•
48-65
•
71-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Outskirts
Quests:
None
The Burial Cave
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. Not to be confused with the Burial Cave near Devil's Crossing, it has two entrances in the
Burrwitch Outskirts
.

(Normal and Elite)

Monster

4-7

5-65

Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burial Hill

The Burial Cave
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It has two entrances on
Burial Hill
.

The Conflagration
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
33-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Withering Fields
Port Valbury
Quests:
None
This article is about the world area. For the relic or the skill it grants, see
Conflagration (relic)
.
The Conflagration
is an area in
Act 3
, adjacent the
Withering Fields
and
Port Valbury
. It consists of an area of farmland overrun with Aetherials and Aetherfire.
Creatures in The Conflagration are offset 3 levels above the player.
Interests
Journeyman's Pack
One-Shot Chest
Detonation Site
leading to
Port Valbury
Aetherial Rift.
Creatures
Boss:
Herald of the Flame
Aether Crystal Cluster
Aether Crystal Formation

PAGE: The Flooded Passage

The Flooded Passage
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
9-13
•
46-60
•
71-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Foggy Bank
Burrwitch Outskirts
Sunken Reliquary
Quests:
None
The Flooded Passage
is an underground world area in
Act 1
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Foggy Bank
and the
Burrwitch Outskirts
.
The exit to Burrwitch Outskirts is blocked until you defeat the
Ancient Shambler
boss.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal only)
Detonation Site
- requires 3 Dynamite; unblocks the entrance to the
Sunken Reliquary
Slith Altar
Creatures
Boneback
Boneback Gnasher
Boneback Plaguebearer
Rabid Boneback
Scavenger

Devouring Swarm
Rifthound

Rifthound - Azure Matriarch

======================================================================
PAGE: The Forsaken Wastes
CATEGORIES: Act 4 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/The_Forsaken_Wastes
======================================================================

The Forsaken Wastes
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
33-60
•
60-80
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Plains of Strife
Obsidian Throne
Quests:
N/A
The Forsaken Wastes
is an area in
Act 4
and connects to the
Plains of Strife
and the
Obsidian Throne
.
The area forms part of the Ch'thonic Void and can be accessed by a Chthonic Rift which spawns unmarked in several different locations around the
Plains of Strife
. The player cannot cast a personal rift while in the Forsaken Wastes and must find another Chthonic Rift (also randomised) to exit.
If the
Rhowari Legacy
quest is in progress, the
Spirit of Mogdrogen
will appear at a random location on this map, marked with a Star icon on the minimap.
Interests
Creatures
Chthonic
:
Voidfiend
Voidfiend Incinerator
Voidfiend Hellion
Chthonian Hungerer
Chthonian Devourer
Chthonian Gorger
Void Parasite
Void Leech
Chthonian Harbinger
Obsidian Shaleborn
Obsidian Defiler
Obsidian Ravager

Gruesome Harvest
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-40
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Rotting Croplands
Quests:
None
The Gruesome Harvest
is a world area in
Act 3
. It connects to the
Rotting Croplands
.
Interests
Aether-Scorched Note
- found in some Human Remains on the side of the road near some Aetherfire.
The Amalgamation (note)
- drops from the area boss.
Creatures
Aether Corruption
:
Walking Dead
Rotting Soldier
Fleshwarped Butcher
Fleshwarped Thrasher
Reanimator

Fleshwarped Vanguard
Fleshwarped Deadeye
Fleshwarped Commander
Aetherthorn Horror
Haunted Scarecrow
Haunted Harvester
Possessend Elementalist
Possessend Archmage
Boss:
The Amalgamation

PAGE: The Immolation

The Immolation
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
33-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Deadman's Gulch
Quests:
N/A
The Immolation
is an area in
Act 3
and connects to
Deadman's Gulch
. It is entered via a Mine Entrance which can only be unlocked during the
Legion Retribution
Act 4 side-quest.
The area is full of Aether Crystals and damaging Aetherfire ground effects.
Interests
Dynamite (1)
Creatures
Aetherial Corruptions:
Fleshwarped Manticore
Manticore Aethermane
Boss:
Herald of Destruction
Guide
Travel to the Deadman's Gulch rift then pass through the path full of Aether fire.
Gallery
Immolation Map
How to get to The Immolation
How to get to The Immolation

The Infestation
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
48-75
•
80-90
•
92-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Crown Hill
Fleshworks
Quests:
-
The Infestation
is an underground area in
Act 6
. It connects to
Crown Hill
and the
Fleshworks
.
Interests
Fleshwarped Stash - a
One-Shot Chest
Living Flesh Door - unlocks during the
The Other You
quest.
Notes
:
A New Consensus
Allostria's Orders
- drop from
Allostria, the Mindthief
NPCs
Allostria, the Mindthief
Creatures
Aetherial
:
Aetherial Scamp, Aetherial Imp
Ascended - Attendant, Ascended Spellbreaker
Aetherial Corruption
:
Aetherial Bloatworm, Aetherial Iceburrower, Aetherial Rotbellower, Aetherial Blazedrinker, Aetherial Stormdrinker
Tainted Hound, Tainted Pack Leader
Fleshwarped Corruption, Fleshshaper, Fleshweaver, Fleshwarped Abberation
Fleshwarped Chilled One, Fleshwarped Scorcher, Fleshwarped Stormwalker
Architect of Flesh
Aetherial Bloater, Aetherial Bileeater, Aetherial Regurgitator
Aetherial Abomination, Aetherial Behemoth, Aetherial Colossus, Aetherial Titan
Aetherial Stormbearer

The Old Dump
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
4-7
•
45-60
•
70-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Burial Hill
Putrid Den
Wightmire
Quests:
None
The Old Dump
is a world area in
Act 1
. It connects to
Burial Hill
, the
Putrid Den
and
Wightmire
.
Interests
Junk Pile
Ornate Strongbox - behind a secret breakable wall on the Wightmire border.

======================================================================
PAGE: The Steps of Torment
CATEGORIES: Act 2 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/The_Steps_of_Torment
======================================================================

The Steps of Torment
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
25-50
•
45-78
•
70-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Broken Hills
Quests:
None
The Steps of Torment
is an underground area in
Act 2
, with the entrance located in the southern part of the
Broken Hills
.
The area is a large multilevel dungeon, and Levels 4 and 5 comprise one of Grim Dawn's sealed
Challenge Dungeons
. A
Skeleton Key
is required to enter the last two floors, and the player cannot use a riftgate to exit; the only way out is via death or completing both levels.
This page concerns level one only. The other levels are:
Level 2:
Pain
Level 3:
Misery
Level 4:
Suffering
Level 5:
Anguish
Interests
Breakable Wall - conceals a cavity with a couple of strongboxes.
Level 3
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Creatures
Undead
:
Apparition
Haunted Noble
Haunted Champion

Skeletal Archer

Storm Revenant
Skeletal Gargantuan
Skeletal Monstrosity

The Undergrowth
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
70-82
•
85-120
Riftgate:
no
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Quests:
n/a
The Undergrowth is an underground area in
Act 5
. The entrance is unmarked and may spawn in any of three locations around
Ugdenbog
.

The Warden's Cellar
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
15-25
•
50-65
•
72-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Burrwitch Estates
Underground Transit
Quests:
None
The Warden's Cellar
is world area in
Act 1
. It is accessible from
Burrwitch Estates
.
Specifically from the rear of the Warden's mansion.
The area contains several breakable walls and secret areas.

Thornsbury Farm
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-40
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Homestead
Elmsworth Farm
Infested Farms
Quests:
Missing Diary
Thornsbury Farm
is a small area in
Act 3
.
After completing the
Infested Fields
quest the area is secured by the
Black Legion
and inhabited by
Oliver Thornsbury
and some Homestead Farmers.
Interests
Daila's Diary
- found on a lectern inside the house at the western end of the area.
Quests
Missing Diary
Creatures
Dermapteran Weavil
Dermapteran Sentinel
Dermapteran Reaver
Dermapteran Vizier
Devouring Swarm

======================================================================
PAGE: Throne of the Three

Throne of the Three
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
24-75
•
35-90
•
45-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Astral Fields
Quests:
N/A
The Throne of the Three is a world area in
Act 7
. It is accessed via
The Eldritch Gate
and the
Astral Fields
, and is the location of the final boss fight for the
Forgotten Gods
expansion.
Interests
Loot Chests
Korvaak's Trove
Korvaak's Essence (One-shot chest)
Notes
Ruminations of the Primordial One
(drops from Korvaak)
Creatures
Boss:
Korvaak, the Eldritch Sun

======================================================================
PAGE: Tomb of Archon Barthollem
CATEGORIES: Act 4 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Tomb_of_Archon_Barthollem
======================================================================

Tomb of Archon Barthollem
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
33-60
•
63-70
•
77-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Fort Ikon
Lost Tomb of the Damned
Quests:
N/A
The
Tomb of Archon Barthollem
is an interior world area in
Act 4
. It has two levels and connects to
Fort Ikon
. To enter this dungeon the player must side with one of the two factions, otherwise the entrance will be locked.
The second level features a secret doorway, activated by a Loose Torch, which leads to the
Lost Tomb of the Damned
.
Interests
Note:
Loose Ends
(Level 2)
Loose Torch
Breakable Wall - South-West corner of level 1
Breakable Wall - Left of the Iron Gate before boss on level 2
Creatures
Archon Barthollem
Kymon's Chosen ~ Zealot
Kymon's Chosen ~ Zealot
Kymon's Chosen ~ Stormbearer
Kymon's Chosen ~ Blade Maiden
Malkadarr, Champion of Death's Vigil
Death's Vigil ~ Neophyte
Death's Vigil ~ Neophyte
Death's Vigil ~ Acolyte
Death's Vigil ~ Dreadlord
Gallery
Level 1
Level 2
Secret room at hero position

Tomb of Ariath
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Valley of the Chosen
Quests:
N/A
The
Tomb of Ariath
is an underground area in
Act 7
. It has a single entrance in the
Valley of the Chosen
.
The are is the target location for the
Preemptive Strike
quest.
Interests
Korvan Secrets (Chest)
Possible location for a
One-Shot Chest
Creatures
Boss:
The Duskreaper

Tomb of Herald Mathis
Location Info
Act:
6
Monster
Levels:
66-68
•
76-90
•
88-120
Riftgate:
None
Adjacent:
Steelcap District
Quests:
N/A
Tomb of Herald Mathis
is an underground world area in
Act 6
, with a single entrance in the
Steelcap District
.
Interests
Loose Torch - can only be activated during the
Mad Ramblings
quest
Hidden Spoils - in a secret area to the right of the large bridge, upper southeast area
NPCs
Bella Fald - Celestial Forge
(Elite and Ultimate only)

,

======================================================================
PAGE: Tomb of Korvaak
CATEGORIES: Act 4 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Tomb_of_Korvaak
======================================================================

Tomb of Korvaak
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
33-60
•
63-70
•
77-100
Riftgate:
None
Adjacent:
Asterkarn Valley
Quests:
Cult Activity
The
Tomb of Korvaak
is an underground world area in
Act 4
, with a single entrance in the
Asterkarn Valley
.
The tomb features a secret area that can only be unlocked during the
Kymon's Secret
side-quest, or after completing it. However, if the player decides to side with the
Order of Death's Vigil
on a later difficulty (Elite, Ultimate), the secret area will no longer be accessible. The tomb can be accessed as part of
Daila's Secret Quest
regardless of this.
This area is also used in the
Cult Activity
quest.
Interests
Ornate Strongbox
Hidden Spoils down stairs, north side of map
Breakable wall near boss room
Avalline's Note - Page 2
Creatures
Chthonians
:
Bloodsworn Adulant
Bloodsworn Zealot
Bloodsworn Summoner
Bloodsworn Void-Caller
Bloodsworn Priest
Bloodsworn Doomsayer

:

Harvoul, the Earthshaker

======================================================================
PAGE: Tomb of Nephos

Tomb of Nephos
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
15-75
•
25-90
•
30-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Valley of the Chosen
Quests:
N/A
The Tomb of Nephos is an underground area in
Act 7
, with a single entrance in the
Valley of the Chosen
.
The area contains a sealed section blocked by a Sorcerous Barrier, which can only be unlocked during the
The Future is Madness
quest for the
Cult of Dreeg
.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
Hidden Spoils
Treasure Trove
Notes:
Scorched Note
and
Rhenet the Rat God
.
NPCs
Algosia Fald - Forgotten Smith
: will craft random
Forgotten Gods
Legendary items.
Creatures
Eldritch
:
Eldritch Spirit

Eldritch Spirit ~ Ancient
Possessed Armor
Eldritch Armor
Ancient Armor
Undead
:
Mummy ~ Festering
Mummy ~ Rotter
Mummy ~ Scorcher

Tomb of Sethan
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster

Infernal Wastes

N/A
The Tomb of Sethan is an underground area in
Act 7
. It has two entrances in the
Infernal Wastes
.

One-Shot Chest

Tomb of Ugdall
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
70-82
•
85-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Ugdenbog
Quests:
The Wraith of Ugdenbog
The
Tomb of Ugdall
is an underground area in
Act 5
It has one entrance located in the Northern part of
Ugdenbog
, south east of the Barrowholm rift.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Note:
Writings of Yeathleanis
Quests
The Wraith of Ugdenbog
NPCs
Ugdall

Skeletal Warrior
Skeletal Archer
Skeletal Priest
Ancient Wraith (in place of Ugdall)

Tomb of the Eldritch Sun
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
24-75
•
35-90
•
45-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Path of Ascension
The Eldritch Gate
Quests:
N/A
The Tomb of the Eldritch Sun is a world area in
Act 7
. It has three levels, with a
Riftgate
at the beginning of the first.

======================================================================
PAGE: Tomb of the Heretic
CATEGORIES: Forgotten Gods Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Tomb_of_the_Heretic
======================================================================

Tomb of the Heretic
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
26-75
•
50-90
•
70-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Lost Oasis
Quests:
-
The
Tomb of the Heretic
is a world area in
Act 7
. The area is accessed via the
Lost Oasis
, and can be found during the
Paying Debts
quest.
Levels 2 and 3 make up one of Grim Dawn's sealed "Roguelike"
Challenge Dungeons
. A crafted
Skeleton Key
is required to continue beyond the first level and the player cannot use a riftgate to exit; the only way out is via death or completing all levels.
The quest is unique in that it focuses on the primordial entity Yugol. The quest involves retracing the steps of the priest Tuha who was tasked with killing Grand Magus Morgoneth and sealing off the influence of Yugol.
This page concerns level one only. The other levels are:
Court of the Magi
Morgoneth's Folly
Interests
Treasure Trove
Exalted Stash
Hidden Spoils
Notes:
Morgoneth's Invitation
Morgoneth's Lessons - Page 1

Eldritch
:
Animated Keeper
Animated Watcher
Animated Preserver
Possessed Armor
Eldritch Armor
Ancient Armor
Eldritch Spirit
Eldritch Spirit - Haunt
Eldritch Spirit - Ancient
Boss:
Keeper of the Seal

======================================================================
PAGE: Tomb of the Watchers
CATEGORIES: Act 4 Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Tomb_of_the_Watchers
======================================================================

Tomb of the Watchers
Location Info
Act:
4
Monster
Levels:
36-60
•
65-70
•
80-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Necropolis Interior
Seal of the Loghorrean
Quests:
None
The
Tomb of the Watchers
is a world area in
Act 4
. It has one entrance located in the
Necropolis Interior
, which is unlocked by destroying the 3 blood wagons around the Necropolis.
This area comprises the first level of the final three-level dungeon. There are two secret chests and two secret areas, which can be accessed by activating Loose Torches.
Interests
Note:
Clarity of Valor
Note:
The Door has Opened
Loose Torch - near the western corner, opens a secret room containing Cultists and a Hidden Spoils chest.
Crumbling wall - South of the Central area, East side of a room allowing access north under an upper area. Room has a pit gate in middle.

Bloodsworn Adulant
Bloodsworn Zealot

Bane'Galgalor, Guardian of the Gate

======================================================================
PAGE: Twin Falls
CATEGORIES: Act 2 Locations, Riftgate Locations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Twin_Falls
======================================================================

Twin Falls
Location Info
Act:
2
Monster
Levels:
21-35
•
54-68
•
73-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Old Arkovia
Swarming Hive
Quests:
None
Twin Falls
is a world area in
Act 2
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Old Arkovia
, the
Swarming Hive
and the
Arkovian Coliseum
. The destroyed bridge near the Riftgate is repairable from the other side and leads to the
Arkovian Docks
.
Prior to activating the riftgate, the area is accessed only from the exit at the end of
Cronley's Hideout
.
Interests
Untouched Meal
Hidden Spoils - in a secret area to the south-west.
NPCs
Palda
Helen Fletcher
Julius Cole
Creatures
Beast
:
Stonetusk
Gargantuan Stonetusk

:

:

Tyrant's Hold
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
30-50
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Shaded Basin
Arkovian Docks
Quests:
None
Tyrant's Hold
is a world area in
Act 3
and connects to the
Shaded Basin
and
Arkovian Docks
.
It consists of a large ruined fort with both exterior and interior areas, is heavily populated by Grobles, and is also home to the Boss creature
Bloodfeast the Ruthless
.
Creatures in Tyrant's Hold are offset 2-3 levels above the player.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Exalted Stash -
One-Shot Chest
Notes
:
Imperial Proclamation
The Journal of Duke Cavanil
Ancient Sarcophagus
Ornate Strongbox
Untouched Meal
Hidden Spoils x3 (Behind Crumbling Walls)
Etram Fald - Celestial Smith
(Elite/Ultimate)
Treasure Trove

Ugdenbog
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
38-66
•
68-82
•
82-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Coven's Refuge
Ancient Grove
Barrowholm
Altar of Rattosh
Den of the Ancient
Quests:
Cleanse the Corruption
Ugdenbog
is a world area in
Act 5
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
Coven's Refuge
and
Barrowholm
. The
Ancient Grove
is located in the southeast corner.
The area is quite large and contains entrances to the following underground areas:
Janaxia's Den
Larria's Den
The Undergrowth
Tomb of Ugdall
Barrowholm Mine
Interests
Detonation Site
- requires 3
Dynamite
and unblocks the bridge to the
Den of the Ancient
Ancient Sarcophagus - Lower Ugdenbog, about halfway between Janaxia's Den and the Ugdenbog Riftgate
Ancient Sarcophagus - Central Ugdenbog just west from the Tomb of Ugdall
Heroic Chest - a chest west of the Tomb of Ugdall which releases three spirits called Neak, Phris, and Alya Dugald.
Creatures
Ugdenbog Crabling, Ugdenbog Crab, Ugdenbog Spikeshell, Ugdenbog Stoneshell
Haunted Crab, Haunted Spikeshell
Leafman Brute, Leafmane Rager, Leafmane Alpha, Leafmane Rotbreather
Basilisk, Venomgaze Basilisk, Stonegaze Basilisk
Wraith, Spiteful Wraith, Ancient Wraith
Devouring Swarm, Feastborn Bloodgorger
Ugdenbog Wretch, Ugdenbog Turned, Ugdenbog Marked
Wendgio, Wendigo Marroweater, Wendigo Flayer, Wendigo Ancient
Carnivorous Plant, Voracious Plant, Poisonous Bloom, Ugdenbog Golem, Ugdenbog Mossflinger, Ugdenbog Overgrowth
Ugdenbog Cannibal - Fleshcrazed, Ugdenbog Cannibal - Bloodsinger, Ugdenbog Cannibal - Wraithspeaker
Boss:
Bargoll, the Mouldering Mound
Gallery
Lower Ugdenbog
Central Ugdenbog

Underground Jail
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
16-30
•
50-65
•
72-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Hidden Laboratory
Inner Laboratory
Quests:
None
The
Underground Jail
is a world area in
Act 1
and is the final section of the
Hidden Laboratory
. This area contains the final Act 1 boss,
The Warden
.

Underground Transit
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
16-30
•
50-65
•
72-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
The Warden's Cellar
Hidden Laboratory
Quests:
None
The
Underground Transit
is a world area in
Act 1
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
The Warden's Cellar
and the
Hidden Laboratory
.
The area contains several breakable walls and secret areas, and an
Abandoned Storerooms
section.
Interests
Ruined Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Untouched Meal
Ornate Strongbox

Valley of the Chosen
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
20-75
•
30-90
•
35-120
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Infernal Wastes
Remnants of Korvan City
Quests:
n/a
The Valley of the Chosen is a world area in
Act 7
. It has a
Riftgate
and is situated between the
Infernal Wastes
and the
Remnants of Korvan City
. It also contains the entrances to the
Tomb of Ariath
,
Tomb of Nephos
and the
Path of the Damned
.
Interests
Note:
Jeren's Travel Log - 2nd Entry

======================================================================
PAGE: Vanguard of the Three

======================================================================

Vanguard of the Three
Location Info
Act:
7
Monster
Levels:
18-75
•
28-90
•
33-120
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
Basalt Crags
Ruins of Abyd
Quests:
Vanguard of the Three is a world area in
Act 7
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to the
Basalt Crags
and the
Ruins of Abyd
.
The area serves as the second hub or town for the
Forgotten Gods
content.
Interests
On Ultimate difficulty, The Legendary dagger
Chillheart
can be acquired by standing in the green ritual circle near the Vanguard Ritualists. The dagger will appear after spending a total of fifteen seconds in the circle.
Quests
Tomb of the Eldritch Sun
The Messenger
Preemptive Strike
Byscilla's Plan
A Future Foretold
The Heart of Onarix
NPCs
Service
Muldin - Cult Supplier
Quest
Vorak
Seer Laurna
Narra
Other
Indalla
Vanguard Ritualist
Cult of Bysmiel - Seeker
Cult of Dreeg - Sentinel
Cult of Solael - Seeker
Gallery
Masteries
Items
Creatures

Village of Darkvale
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
31-45
•
60-70
•
76-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Gryver's Mill
Darkvale Gate
Quests:
None
The
Village of Darkvale
is a world area in
Act 3
, and connects to
Gryver's Mill
and
Darkvale Gate
.
Interests
Desecrated Shrine
(Normal/Elite/Ultimate)
Notes:
Trevor's Note
Mayor Bridgewater's Journal
Peacekeeper Chambre's Journal
Zaria's Journal - Page 1
The Bath House
Journeyman's Pack (x2)

Chthonic

Chtonian Hungerer
Chthonian Gorger

Voidfiend

Zaria, the Carver

Void's Edge
Location Info
Act:
5
Monster
Levels:
40-70
•
74-85
•
85-200
Riftgate:
no
Adjacent:
Desolate Wastes
Lone Watch
Quests:
n/a
The
Void's Edge
is a world area in
Act 5
and connects to
Desolate Wastes
and
Lone Watch
. The area forms part of the Ch'thonic Void and can be accessed by a Chthonic Rift in the Desolate Wastes.
The player cannot cast a personal rift while in the Void's Edge and must find another Chthonic Rift to exit.
Interests
Hidden Trove
Hidden Spoils
NPCs
Ulgrim
Creatures
Chthonic
:
Chthonian Hungerer, Chthonian Devourer, Chthonian Gorger
Voidfiend, Voidfiend Incinerator, Voidfiend Hellion
Void Parasite, Void Leech, Void Souldrinker
Chthonian Harbinger, Chthonian Servitor, Chthonian Harvester, Chthonian Bloodkeeper
Obsidian Shaleborn, Obsidian Defiler, Obsidian Ravager
Void Rylok, Void Taskmaster, Void Oppressor
Boss
Ekket'Zul, Progenitor of Darkness - Void Oppressor boss

======================================================================
PAGE: Wightmire
CATEGORIES: Act 1 Locations, Riftgate Locations

Wightmire
Location Info
Act:
1
Monster
Levels:
5-9
•
45-60
•
70-100
Riftgate:
Yes
Adjacent:
The Old Dump
Sodden Hollow
Foggy Bank
Quests:
That Good Old Slith Charm
Wightmire
is a world area in
Act 1
. It has a
Riftgate
and connects to
The Old Dump
,
Sodden Hollow
and
Foggy Bank
.
The area consists of a large area of marshland that lies east of
Devil's Crossing
.
Wightmire features a small Rover camp with several NPCs, including a merchant who will buy equipment at a higher rate than in Devil's Crossing.
Interests
Cavern
Cavern
Journeyman's Pack
Quests
That Good Old Slith Charm

Roving Dealer

Withering Fields
Location Info
Act:
3
Monster
Levels:
28-40
•
58-70
•
75-100
Riftgate:
No
Adjacent:
Prospector's Trail
Homestead
The Conflagration
Quests:
None
The
Withering Fields
is an area in
Act 3
. It connects to
Prospector's Trail
,
Homestead
and
The Conflagration
.

Grobles
:
Stone Clan, Ember Clan
Riftspawn
:
Briarthorn Horror
Briarthorn Terror
Aether Corruption
